021038.phonetic: A-se-no Tsi-sa hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, v-tla yi-s-di-ga-ta-ha nu-s-dv i-s-di-ta-yo-hi-hv-i.  Tsi-sa ye-li-quo ge-s-da-di-ta-s-di u-li-s-qui-di na-s-gi a-qua-di-ta-s-di tsi-gi?  A-le di-ga-ye-s-da-wo-s-di na-s-gi di-da-wo-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi v-qua-wo-s-do-di tsi-gi?

021039.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏰᎵᏉ.  ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᏓᏍᏓᏗᏔᎯ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏓᏬᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏴ ᎥᏆᏬᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏙᏓᏰᏍᏓᏬᏍᏔᏂ;
021039.english: And they said unto him, We can. And Jesus said unto them, Ye shall indeed drink of the cup that I drink of; and with the baptism that I am baptized withal shall ye be baptized:
021039.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, ye-li-quo.  Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, U-do-hi-yu-hi da-s-da-di-ta-hi u-li-s-qui-di na-s-gi a-yv a-qua-di-ta-s-di tsi-gi, a-le di-da-wo-s-di ge-sv a-yv v-qua-wo-s-do-di tsi-gi, na-s-gi do-da-ye-s-da-wo-s-ta-ni;

021040.cherokee: ᎤᏪᏗᏱᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏉᎸ ᏥᎦᏘᏏ ᎢᏗᏢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎦᏍᎦᏂ ᎢᏗᏢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏓᏁᏗ ᏱᎩ; ᎤᏅᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᎦᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ
021040.english: But to sit on my right hand and on my left hand is not mine to give; but it shall be given to them for whom it is prepared.
021040.phonetic: U-we-di-yi-s-gi-ni a-quo-lv tsi-ga-ti-si i-di-tlv, a-le tsi-ga-s-ga-ni i-di-tlv, v-tla a-yv a-qua-da-ne-di yi-gi; u-nv-sv-s-gi-ni na-s-gi ge-ga-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi

021041.cherokee: ᎠᏍᎪᎯᏃ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅ, ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎮ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎡᏍᎦ ᏚᏂᏰᎸᎾᏁᎴ ᏥᎻ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ.
021041.english: And when the ten heard it, they began to be much displeased with James and John.
021041.phonetic: A-s-go-hi-no i-ya-ni-dv u-na-dv-ga-nv, u-na-le-nv-he u-tsa-ti e-s-ga du-ni-ye-lv-na-ne-le Tsi-mi a-le Tsa-ni.

021042.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏌ ᏫᏚᏯᏅᎲ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ; ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏥᏰᎸᎢ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏁᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᏗᎬᏩᎾᏁᎶᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏅᏁᎰᎢ; ᏧᏂᎸᏉᏗᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᎾᏓᎵᏁᎯᏕᎰᎢ.
021042.english: But Jesus called them to him, and saith unto them, Ye know that they which are accounted to rule over the Gentiles exercise lordship over them; and their great ones exercise authority upon them.
021042.phonetic: A-se-no tsi-sa wi-du-ya-nv-hv hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i; I-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-tsi-ye-lv-i ge-sv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi da-ne-wa-di-sv-i, di-gv-wa-na-ne-lo-do-di-yi na-nv-ne-ho-i; tsu-ni-lv-quo-di-no ge-sv gv-wa-na-da-li-ne-hi-de-ho-i.

021043.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎥᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏂᏨᏁᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
021043.english: But so shall it not be among you: but whosoever will be great among you, shall be your minister:
021043.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni i-tse-hv v-tle-s-di na-s-gi yi-ni-tsv-ne-s-di; gi-lo-s-gi-ni a-tsi-lv-quo-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-du-li-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi e-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di ge-se-s-di.

021044.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎬᏩᏅᏏᏙᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
021044.english: And whosoever of you will be the chiefest, shall be servant of all.
021044.phonetic: A-le gi-lo ni-hi ni-tsa-dv-nv nu-gv-wi-yu-sv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-du-li-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi ni-ga-dv gv-wa-nv-si-do-hi ge-se-s-di.

021045.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎥᏝ ᏳᎷᏨ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏅ ᏧᏲᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏧᎫᏴᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ.
021045.english: For even the Son of man came not to be ministered unto, but to minister, and to give his life a ransom for many.
021045.phonetic: Na-s-quo-ye-no yv-wi U-we-tsi v-tla yu-lu-tsv go-hu-s-di a-ga-dv-ne-di-yi, go-hu-s-di-s-gi-ni u-da-dv-ne-di-yi, a-le gv-nv tsu-yo-hi-s-di-yi tsu-gu-yv-do-di-yi u-ni-tsa-ti.

021046.cherokee: ᏤᎵᎪᏃ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᎵᎪ ᎢᎤᏄᎪᏨ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ, ᏗᎨᏫ ᏆᏗᎻᏯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎻᏯ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎤᏬᎴ ᏅᏃᎱᎶᏗ ᎠᏚᎳᏗᏍᎨᎢ.
021046.english: And they came to Jericho: and as he went out of Jericho with his disciples and a great number of people, blind Bartimaeus, the son of Timaeus, sat by the highway side begging.
021046.phonetic: Tse-li-go-no u-ni-lu-tse-i, a-le na-s-gi Tse-li-go i-u-nu-go-tsv a-le na-s-gi gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, a-le u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi, di-ge-wi Qua-di-mi-ya, na-s-gi Di-mi-ya u-we-tsi, u-wo-le nv-no-hu-lo-di a-du-la-di-s-ge-i.

021047.cherokee: ᎤᏛᎦᏅᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎾᏎᎵᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎤᏪᎷᏁ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᏥᏌ, ᏍᎩᏙᎵᎩ.
021047.english: And when he heard that it was Jesus of Nazareth, he began to cry out, and say, Jesus, thou Son of David, have mercy on me.
021047.phonetic: U-dv-ga-nv-no na-s-gi Tsi-sa Na-se-li-di e-hi ge-sv-i, u-le-nv-he u-we-lu-ne, hi-a nu-we-se-i, De-wi U-we-tsi, Tsi-sa, s-gi-do-li-gi.

021048.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏃ ᎬᏩᎬᏍᎪᎸᏁ ᎬᏩᏁᏤᎴ ᎡᎳᏪᏱ ᎤᏮᏗᏱ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏟᏉ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏪᎷᏁᎢ, ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏍᎩᏙᎵᎩ, ᎠᏗᏍᎨᎢ.
021048.english: And many charged him that he should hold his peace: but he cried the more a great deal, Thou Son of David, have mercy on me.
021048.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-te-no gv-wa-gv-s-go-lv-ne gv-wa-ne-tse-le e-la-we-yi u-wv-di-yi; a-se-no u-tli-quo i-ga-i u-we-lu-ne-i, De-wi U-we-tsi s-gi-do-li-gi, a-di-s-ge-i.

021049.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎴᏫᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᏁᏤ ᏩᏥᏯᏅᏗᏱ.  ᎤᏂᏯᏅᎮᏃ ᏗᎨᏫ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗᏉ ᎭᏓᏅᏓᏓ; ᏔᎴᎲᎦ; ᏗᏣᏯᏂᎭ.
021049.english: And Jesus stood still, and commanded him to be called. And they call the blind man, saying unto him, Be of good comfort, rise; he calleth thee.
021049.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-le-wi-s-ta-nv u-ne-tse wa-tsi-ya-nv-di-yi.  U-ni-ya-nv-he-no di-ge-wi, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-le-i, U-ga-li-s-di-quo ha-da-nv-da-da; ta-le-hv-ga; di-tsa-ya-ni-ha.

021050.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏓᎢᏅ ᎤᏄᏬ ᏚᎴᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏌ ᏭᎷᏤᎴᎢ.
021050.english: And he, casting away his garment, rose, and came to Jesus.
021050.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-da-i-nv u-nu-wo du-le-ne-i, a-le Tsi-sa wu-lu-tse-le-i.

021051.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏣᏚᎵ ᎬᏯᏛᏁᏗᏱ?  ᏗᎨᏫᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏣᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎥᎠᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ [ᎠᏆᏚᎵᎭ.]
021051.english: And Jesus answered and said unto him, What wilt thou that I should do unto thee? The blind man said unto him, Lord, that I might receive my sight.
021051.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ga-do tsa-du-li gv-ya-dv-ne-di-yi?  Di-ge-wi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tsa-gv-wi-yu-hi, v-a-gi-go-wa-dv-di-yi [a-qua-du-li-ha.]

021052.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎮᎾᏉᏃ; ᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᏣᏍᏕᎸ.  ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎬᏩᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎢᏒᎢ.
021052.english: And Jesus said unto him, Go thy way; thy faith hath made thee whole. And immediately he received his sight, and followed Jesus in the way.
021052.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, He-na-quo-no; tso-hi-yu-sv tsa-s-de-lv.  Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv gv-wa-go-wa-dv-di nu-li-s-ta-ne-i, a-le u-s-da-wa-dv-se Tsi-sa a-i-sv-i.

021101.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏃ ᎾᎥ ᏭᏂᎷᏨ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏒᎦᏙᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏇᏗᏂᏱ ᎢᏴᏛ, ᎣᎵᏩᏲᎯ ᎤᏌᎯᎸᎢ, ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᏚᏅᏎᎢ,
021101.english: And when they came nigh to Jerusalem, unto Bethphage and Bethany, at the mount of Olives, he sendeth forth two of his disciples,
021101.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-no na-v wu-ni-lu-tsv na-s-gi Sv-ga-do-hi a-le Que-di-ni-yi i-yv-dv, O-li-wa-yo-hi u-sa-hi-lv-i, a-ni-ta-li gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi du-nv-se-i,

021102.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎢᏍᏕᎾ Ꮎ ᏕᏍᏗᏙᎬ ᏧᏳᎪᏗ ᏨᏗᎦᏚᎭ ᏫᏍᏗᏣᎯ; ᏫᏍᏗᏴᎸᏉᏃ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ, ᏓᏰᏍᏗᏩᏛᎯ ᏗᎦᎵᎠᏅᎯᏛ ᎠᎩᎾ ᎨᎵᏌᏕᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎩᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᎡᏍᏕᎵᏌᏕᏒᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏤᏍᏓᏘᏁᏒᎭ.
021102.english: And saith unto them, Go your way into the village over against you: and as soon as ye be entered into it, ye shall find a colt tied, whereon never man sat; loose him, and bring him.
021102.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, I-s-de-na na de-s-di-do-gv tsu-yu-go-di tsv-di-ga-du-ha wi-s-di-tsa-hi; wi-s-di-yv-lv-quo-no na-hna-ni, da-ye-s-di-wa-dv-hi di-ga-li-a-nv-hi-dv a-gi-na ge-li-sa-de-s-di, na-s-gi v-tla gi-lo yv-wi u-gi-lv-ta-nv-hi yi-gi; e-s-de-li-sa-de-sv-ha a-le tse-s-da-ti-ne-sv-ha.

021103.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎦᏙᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏍᏓᏛᏁᎭ ᎢᏍᏙᏎᎸᎭ?  ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏚᎵᎭ, ᎢᏍᏓᏛᏅᎭ; ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏙᏓᏳᏲᏏ ᎠᏂ ᎡᏍᏓᏘᏃᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
021103.english: And if any man say unto you, Why do ye this? say ye that the Lord hath need of him; and straightway he will send him hither.
021103.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo Ga-do-no na-s-gi ni-s-da-dv-ne-ha i-s-do-se-lv-ha?  U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-du-li-ha, i-s-da-dv-nv-ha; gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv do-da-yu-yo-si a-ni e-s-da-ti-no-hi-s-di-yi.

021104.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏅᏎᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᏂᏩᏛᎮ ᎠᎩᎾ ᎨᎵᏌᏕ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏳᎶᏗ ᏙᏱᏗᏢ, ᎾᎿᎭᏕᎦᏅᏅ ᏓᏠᏍᎬᎢ; ᎤᏁᎵᏌᏕᏎᏃ.
021104.english: And they went their way, and found the colt tied by the door without in a place where two ways met; and they loose him.
021104.phonetic: U-ne-nv-se-no, a-le wu-ni-wa-dv-he a-gi-na ge-li-sa-de ga-lo-hi-s-di-yu-lo-di do-yi-di-tlv, na-hna de-ga-nv-nv da-tlo-s-gv-i; u-ne-li-sa-de-se-no.

021105.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᏗᏂᏙᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏂᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᎡᏍᏕᎵᏌᏕ ᎠᎩᏫ?
021105.english: And certain of them that stood there said unto them, What do ye, loosing the colt?
021105.phonetic: Gi-lo-no i-yu-na-s-di na-hna di-ni-do-gi hi-a ni-du-ni-we-se-le-i, Ga-do-no i-e-s-de-li-sa-de a-gi-wi?

021106.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᏥᏌ ᏄᏪᏒ ᎤᏁᏨ ᏂᏚᏂᏪᏎᎴᎢ:  ᏚᏂᏲᏎᏃ.
021106.english: And they said unto them even as Jesus had commanded: and they let them go.
021106.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi-ya-quo Tsi-sa nu-we-sv u-ne-tsv ni-du-ni-we-se-le-i:  du-ni-yo-se-no.

021107.cherokee: ᎠᎩᎾᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎾᏘᏃᎮᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏄᏬ ᏚᏂᏢᏁᎴᎢ; ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎩᎸᏔᏁᎢ.
021107.english: And they brought the colt to Jesus, and cast their garments on him; and he sat upon him.
021107.phonetic: A-gi-na-no Tsi-sa u-na-ti-no-he-le-i, a-le tsu-na-nu-wo du-ni-tlv-ne-le-i; Tsi-sa-no u-gi-lv-ta-ne-i.

021108.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏃ ᏧᎾᏄᏬ ᏅᏃᎯ ᏚᏄᏰᏍᏛᏁᎢ; ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᏕᏡᎬ ᏚᏅᏂᎦᎸᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏃᎯ ᏚᏂᎳᎨᏯᏛᏁᎢ.
021108.english: And many spread their garments in the way: and others cut down branches off the trees, and strawed them in the way.
021108.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-te-no tsu-na-nu-wo nv-no-hi du-nu-ye-s-dv-ne-i; i-ga-dv-no de-tlu-gv du-nv-ni-ga-lv-he-i, a-le nv-no-hi du-ni-la-ge-ya-dv-ne-i.

021109.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᎢ ᎠᏁᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏂ ᎠᏁᎩ, ᎤᏁᎷᎨᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ, ᎰᏌᎾ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏕᎤᏙᏍᏛ ᏥᎦᎷᎯᏍᏗᏓ.
021109.english: And they that went before, and they that followed, cried, saying, Hosanna; Blessed is he that cometh in the name of the Lord:
021109.phonetic: I-gv-yi-i a-ne-gi, a-le o-ni a-ne-gi, u-ne-lu-ge-i, hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i, Ho-sa-na, Ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di Yi-ho-wa de-u-do-s-dv tsi-ga-lu-hi-s-di-da.

021110.cherokee: ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏫ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏚᏙᏍᏛ ᏥᎦᎷᎯᏍᏗᎭ; ᎰᏌᎾ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏳ.
021110.english: Blessed be the kingdom of our father David, that cometh in the name of the Lord: Hosanna in the highest.
021110.phonetic: Ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di De-wi i-gi-do-da u-tse-li u-gv-wi-yu-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi Yi-ho-wa du-do-s-dv tsi-ga-lu-hi-s-di-ha; Ho-sa-na wa-s-dv ga-lv-la-di-yu.

021111.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻ ᏭᏴᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏔᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏭᏴᎴᎢ; ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎬᏩᏚᏫᏛ ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏂᏙᎸ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏚᎧᎿᎭᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏒᎯᏴᏱ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏄᎪᏤ ᏇᏗᏂᏱ ᏭᎶᏎ ᎠᏁᎮ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ.
021111.english: And Jesus entered into Jerusalem, and into the temple: and when he had looked round about upon all things, and now the eventide was come, he went out unto Bethany with the twelve.
021111.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no Tsi-lu-si-li-mi wu-yv-le-i, a-le u-ta-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi wu-yv-le-i; hna-quo-no gv-wa-du-wi-dv du-ka-hna-ni-do-lv ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv du-ka-hna-nv, a-le hna-quo u-sv-hi-yv-yi ge-se-i, u-nu-go-tse Que-di-ni-yi wu-lo-se a-ne-he ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv.

021112.english: And on the morrow, when they were come from Bethany, he was hungry:

021113.cherokee: ᏭᎪᎮᏃ Ꭸ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏗᏡᎨ ᏒᎦᎳᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎤᎵᏍᏚᏎᎢ, ᏭᎷᏤᎢ, ᏯᏎᎦᎩ ᏱᏥᏩᏛ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏳᏔ ᎤᏪᎵᏎᎢ; ᎾᎿᎭᏃ ᏭᎷᏨ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏳᏩᏛᎮ ᎤᎵᏍᏚᏒᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎠᏏ ᏳᏍᏆᎸᎮ ᏒᎦᏔᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏂᏍᏗᏱ.
021113.english: And seeing a fig tree afar off having leaves, he came, if haply he might find any thing thereon: and when he came to it, he found nothing but leaves; for the time of figs was not yet.
021113.phonetic: Wu-go-he-no ge i-yv-dv di-tlu-ge sv-ga-la-i-yu-s-di, u-li-s-du-se-i, wu-lu-tse-i, ya-se-ga-gi yi-tsi-wa-dv go-hu-s-di yu-ta u-we-li-se-i; na-hna-no wu-lu-tsv v-tla go-hu-s-di yu-wa-dv-he u-li-s-du-sv-quo u-wa-sv; v-tla-ye-no a-si yu-s-qua-lv-he sv-ga-ta-i-yu-na-s-di u-nv-ni-s-di-yi.

021114.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏥᎠᎩ ᏂᎯ ᏣᏓᏔᏅᎯ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ.  ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏁᎢ.
021114.english: And Jesus answered and said unto it, No man eat fruit of thee hereafter for ever. And his disciples heard it.
021114.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Tle-s-di gi-lo i-lv-hi-yu tsi-a-gi ni-hi tsa-da-ta-nv-hi go-hi i-yu-da-le-nv-dv.  Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no u-na-dv-ga-ne-i.

021115.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏃ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎢ; ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏔᏅ-ᏗᎦᏔᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏭᏴᎸ, ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᏚᏄᎪᏫᏎ ᎠᏂᎾᏕᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏩᎡᎥᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᏔᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎷᏆᏗᏅᏎ ᏚᏂᏍᎩᎸ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏗᏂᏟᏴᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏅᏗᏱ ᎫᎴ -ᏗᏂᏍᎪᏂᎯ ᏗᏂᎾᏕᎩ;
021115.english: And they come to Jerusalem: and Jesus went into the temple, and began to cast out them that sold and bought in the temple, and overthrew the tables of the moneychangers, and the seats of them that sold doves;
021115.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-no u-ni-lu-tse-i; Tsi-sa-no u-ta-nv--di-ga-ta-wi-i-s-di-yi wu-yv-lv, u-le-nv-he du-nu-go-wi-se a-ni-na-de-gi a-le u-ni-wa-e-v-s-gi na-hna u-ta-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le du-lu-qua-di-nv-se du-ni-s-gi-lv a-de-lv di-ni-tli-yv-s-gi, a-le u-na-nv-di-yi gu-le--di-ni-s-go-ni-hi di-ni-na-de-gi;

021116.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏳᏪᎵᏎᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎠᏖᎵᏙ ᎤᏴᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
021116.english: And would not suffer that any man should carry any vessel through the temple.
021116.phonetic: A-le v-tla u-ne-la-gi yu-we-li-se-le gi-lo go-hu-s-di u-s-di a-te-li-do u-yv-do-di-yi u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi.

021117.cherokee: ᏚᏕᏲᏁᏃ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᎬᏅ ᏱᎪᏪᎳ, ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏚᏙᎡᏍᏗ?  ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏂᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏍᏓᎦᎸ ᏂᏨᏁᎸ.
021117.english: And he taught, saying unto them, Is it not written, My house shall be called of all nations the house of prayer? but ye have made it a den of thieves.
021117.phonetic: Du-de-yo-ne-no, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, tla-s-go hi-a yi-ni-gv-nv yi-go-we-la, a-qua-tse-li a-da-ne-lv ni-ga-di-yu tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-na-da-do-li-s-do-di-yi du-do-e-s-di?  Ni-hi-s-gi-ni a-ni-no-s-gi-s-gi u-ni-yv-s-di-yi u-s-da-ga-lv ni-tsv-ne-lv.

021118.cherokee: ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏲᎴ ᎢᏳᏅᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᎬᏩᎾᏰᏍᎨᏰᏃ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᏍᏆᏂᎪᏍᎬ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ.
021118.english: And the scribes and chief priests heard it, and sought how they might destroy him: for they feared him, because all the people was astonished at his doctrine.
021118.phonetic: Di-no-we-li-s-gi-no a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi u-na-dv-ga-ne-i, a-le u-ni-yo-le i-yu-nv-ne-di-yi u-ni-hi-s-di-yi; gv-wa-na-ye-s-ge-ye-no, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge ni-ga-dv yv-wi u-ni-s-qua-ni-go-s-gv nu-s-dv da-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i.

021119.english: And when even was come, he went out of the city.

021120.cherokee: ᏑᎾᎴᏃ ᎠᎾᎢᏒᎢ, ᎤᏂᎪᎮ ᎡᎦᏔᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬ ᎤᏩᏴᏒᎯ ᎨᏎ ᏚᎿᎭᏍᏕᏢ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ.
021120.english: And in the morning, as they passed by, they saw the fig tree dried up from the roots.
021120.phonetic: Su-na-le-no a-na-i-sv-i, u-ni-go-he e-ga-ta-i-yu-s-di tlu-gv u-wa-yv-sv-hi ge-se du-hna-s-de-tlv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv.

021121.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ ᎤᏅᏓᏛ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎡᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬ ᏥᏍᎦᏨᎩ ᎤᏩᏴᏐᏅ.
021121.english: And Peter calling to remembrance saith unto him, Master, behold, the fig tree which thou cursedst is withered away.
021121.phonetic: Qui-da-no u-nv-da-dv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, gv-ni-yu-quo, e-ga-ta---i-yu-s-di tlu-gv tsi-s-ga-tsv-gi u-wa-yv-so-nv.

021122.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏎᏍᏗ.
021122.english: And Jesus answering saith unto them, Have faith in God.
021122.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi e-tso-i-yu-se-s-di.

021123.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎩᎶ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏦᏓᎸ, ᏪᏣᎲᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᏪᏣᏚᎦ; ᎠᎴ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᎡᎲᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏫᏱ, ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏄᏪᏒᎢ.
021123.english: For verily I say unto you, That whosoever shall say unto this mountain, Be thou removed, and be thou cast into the sea; and shall not doubt in his heart, but shall believe that those things which he saith shall come to pass; he shall have whatsoever he saith.
021123.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya-ye-no hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, Gi-lo hi-a ni-ga-we-se-he-s-di hi-a tso-da-lv, We-tsa-hv-na, a-le a-me-quo-hi we-tsa-du-ga; a-le nu-dla-si-dv-e-hv-na i-ge-se-s-di u-na-wi-yi, go-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-s-di-quo-s-gi-ni na-s-gi ni-ga-we-s-gv a-se i-yu-li-s-do-di ge-sv-i; na-s-gi u-he-s-di ni-ga-v nu-we-sv-i.

021124.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏔᏲᎭ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓ, ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᏁᎢ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏥᎮᏍᏗ.
021124.english: Therefore I say unto you, What things soever ye desire, when ye pray, believe that ye receive them, and ye shall have them.
021124.phonetic: na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, Ni-ga-v go-hu-s-di i-tsi-ta-yo-ha i-tsa-da-do-li-s-da, i-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ge-s-di e-tsi-ne-i ge-sv-i, a-le a-se i-tsi-he-s-di.

021125.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎢᏣᎴᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎨᏣᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᏍᎦᏅᏤᎸᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏤᎵᏎᎮᏍᏗ ᎩᎶᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᏔᏗ ᏤᎭ ᎦᎨᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
021125.english: And when ye stand praying, forgive, if ye have ought against any: that your Father also which is in heaven may forgive you your trespasses.
021125.phonetic: I-yu-no i-tsa-le-hv-s-ge-s-di i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di, ge-tsa-da-ne-he-s-di e-tsi-s-ga-nv-tse-lv-i, i-yu-no go-hu-s-di e-tse-li-se-he-s-di gi-lo-i; na-s-gi na-s-quo I-tsi-do-da ga-lv-ta-di tse-ha ga-ge-tsi-ne-di-yi hi-a i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

021126.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏣᏓᏁᎲᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᏍᎦᏅᏤᎸᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᏴᎨᏥᏙᎵᎩ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ.
021126.english: But if ye do not forgive, neither will your Father which is in heaven forgive your trespasses.
021126.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni ni-tsa-da-ne-hv-na i-ge-se-s-di e-tsi-s-ga-nv-tse-lv-i, v-tla na-s-quo I-tsi-do-da ga-lv-la-di e-hi yv-ge-tsi-do-li-gi i-tsi-s-ga-nv-tsv-i.

021127.cherokee: ᏥᎷᏏᎵᎻᏃ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎢ; ᎤᏛᏅᏃ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎡᏙᎮᎢ, ᎬᏩᎷᏤᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ,
021127.english: And they come again to Jerusalem: and as he was walking in the temple, there come to him the chief priests, and the scribes, and the elders,
021127.phonetic: Tsi-lu-si-li-mi-no ta-li-ne u-ni-lu-tse-i; u-dv-nv-no--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi e-do-he-i, gv-wa-lu-tse-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi, a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi, a-le di-ni-la-wi-gi,

021128.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎿᎭᏛᏁᎭ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᏣᏁᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ?
021128.english: And say unto him, By what authority doest thou these things? and who gave thee this authority to do these things?
021128.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, Ga-do tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-di hi-a na-s-gi tsi-hna-dv-ne-ha?  A-le ga-go tsa-ne-le na-s-gi hi-a i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi?

021129.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏑᏓᎴᎩ ᏛᏨᏯᏛᏛᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ, ᎠᏴᏃ ᏓᏨᏃᏁᎵ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᎦᏛᏁᎭ.
021129.english: And Jesus answered and said unto them, I will also ask of you one question, and answer me, and I will tell you by what authority I do these things.
021129.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, A-yv na-s-gi su-da-le-gi dv-tsv-ya-dv-dv-ni, a-le s-gi-no-hv-si, a-yv-no da-tsv-no-ne-li nu-s-dv a-qua-li-s-ga-s-do-dv hi-a na-s-gi tsi-ni-ga-dv-ne-ha.

021130.cherokee: ᏣᏂ ᏥᏓᏓᏬᏍᎬᎩ, ᎦᎸᎳᏍᎪ ᏧᏓᎴᏁᎢ, ᏴᏫᏉᎨ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ?  ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ.
021130.english: The baptism of John, was it from heaven, or of men? answer me.
021130.phonetic: Tsa-ni tsi-da-da-wo-s-gv-gi, ga-lv-la-s-go tsu-da-le-ne-i, yv-wi-quo-ge a-ne-hv-i?  S-gi-no-hv-si.

021131.cherokee: ᎤᏅᏒᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᎵᏃᎮᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ ᏱᎦᏛᏅ, ᎯᎠ ᏱᏂᎦᏫ, ᎦᏙᏃ Ꮭ ᏱᎡᏦᎢᏳᏁᎢ?
021131.english: And they reasoned with themselves, saying, If we shall say, From heaven; he will say, Why then did ye not believe him?
021131.phonetic: U-nv-sv-no ge-sv u-na-li-no-he-le-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, I-yu-no ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi yi-ga-dv-nv, hi-a yi-ni-ga-wi, Ga-do-no tla yi-e-tso-i-yu-ne-i?

021132.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎠᏁᎲ ᏱᎦᏛᏅ,^ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏂᏍᎦᎢᎮ ᏴᏫ; ᏂᎦᏛᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎬᏩᏰᎸᎭ ᏣᏂ.
021132.english: But if we shall say, Of men; they feared the people: for all men counted John, that he was a prophet indeed.
021132.phonetic: I-yu-no yv-wi-quo a-ne-hv yi-ga-dv-nv,^na-s-gi da-ni-s-ga-i-he yv-wi; ni-ga-dv-ye-no yv-wi a-do-le-ho-s-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi gv-wa-ye-lv-ha Tsa-ni.

021133.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎴ ᏥᏌ, ᎥᏝ ᏲᏥᎦᏔᎭ.  ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᏴᏓᏨᏃᏁᎵ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᎦᏛᏁᎭ.
021133.english: And they answered and said unto Jesus, We cannot tell. And Jesus answering saith unto them, Neither do I tell you by what authority I do these things.
021133.phonetic: U-ni-ne-tsv-no hi-a nu-ni-we-se-le Tsi-sa, V-tla yo-tsi-ga-ta-ha.  Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, V-tla na-s-quo a-yv yv-da-tsv-no-ne-li i-yu-s-di a-qua-li-s-ga-s-do-dv hi-a na-s-gi tsi-ni-ga-dv-ne-ha.

021201.cherokee: ᎤᎴᏅᎮᏃ ᏚᏬᏁᏔᏁ ᏓᏟᎶᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.  ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏚᏫᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏐᏱᎴ ᎬᏩᏚᏫᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᎪᏎ ᎩᎦᎨ-ᎠᏗᏔᏍᏗ ᎪᏢᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᏍᎨᎮ ᎢᏅ ᎢᎦᏘ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏙᎳᏍᏔᏁ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏅ ᏭᎶᏎᎢ.
021201.english: And he began to speak unto them by parables. A certain man planted a vineyard, and set an hedge about it, and digged a place for the winefat, and built a tower, and let it out to husbandmen, and went into a far country.
021201.phonetic: U-le-nv-he-no du-wo-ne-ta-ne da-tli-lo-s-di-s-gv-i.  Gi-lo i-yu-s-di te-lv-la-di du-wi-se-i, a-le u-so-yi-le gv-wa-du-wi-dv, a-le u-s-go-se gi-ga-ge--a-di-ta-s-di go-tlv-di-yi, a-le u-ne-s-ge-he i-nv i-ga-ti, a-le du-do-la-s-ta-ne tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, a-le i-nv wu-lo-se-i.

021202.cherokee: ᎤᏅᏂᏍᏗᏱᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎢ, ᎤᏅᏎ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏗᏁᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᏉᏨᎯ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒᎢ.
021202.english: And at the season he sent to the husbandmen a servant, that he might receive from the husbandmen of the fruit of the vineyard.
021202.phonetic: U-nv-ni-s-di-yi-no ge-sv i-yu-i, u-nv-se u-nv-si-da-s-di tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi di-ne-hv-i, na-s-gi tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi nv-da-gv-wa-ne-di-yi u-ne-quo-tsv-hi te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv-i.

021203.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏩᏂᏴᎮᏃ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᎥᏂᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏒᎭ ᎢᎬᏩᏂᎩᏍᏔᏁᎢ.
021203.english: And they caught him, and beat him, and sent him away empty.
021203.phonetic: I-gv-wa-ni-yv-he-no, a-le i-gv-wa-li-v-ni-le-i, a-le a-sv-ha i-gv-wa-ni-gi-s-ta-ne-i.

021204.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏎ ᏗᏁᎲᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏅᏯᏉ ᏙᎬᏩᏂᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏩᏐᏅᏁ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏩᏂᎩᏍᏔᏁ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎢᎬᏩᏁᎸᎯ.
021204.english: And again he sent unto them another servant; and at him they cast stones, and wounded him in the head, and sent him away shamefully handled.
021204.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no nv-wa-da-le u-nv-si-da-s-di u-nv-se di-ne-hv-i; na-s-gi-no nv-ya-quo do-gv-wa-ni-s-ta-ne-i, a-le i-gv-wa-so-nv-ne a-s-go-li, a-le i-gv-wa-ni-gi-s-ta-ne u-de-ho-hi-s-di i-gv-wa-ne-lv-hi.

021205.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎤᏅᏎᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎴᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏖ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴᎢ; ᎢᎦᏛ ᏓᏂᎵᎥᏂᎮᎢ, ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᏓᏂᎯᎮᎢ.
021205.english: And again he sent another; and him they killed, and many others; beating some, and killing some.
021205.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no nv-wa-da-le u-nv-se-i; a-le na-s-gi u-ni-le-i; a-le u-ni-tsa-te nv-wa-na-da-le-i; i-ga-dv da-ni-li-v-ni-he-i, i-ga-dv-no da-ni-hi-he-i.

021206.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏃ ᏌᏉ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎡᎮᎢ, ᎤᎨᏳᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏅᏎ ᎣᏂᏱ ᏗᏁᎲᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎠᏎ ᏛᏂᎸᏉᏔᏂ ᎠᏇᏥ.
021206.english: Having yet therefore one son, his wellbeloved, he sent him also last unto them, saying, They will reverence my son.
021206.phonetic: A-si-no sa-quo u-we-tsi e-he-i, u-ge-yu-hi, na-s-gi na-s-quo u-nv-se o-ni-yi di-ne-hv-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i, A-se dv-ni-lv-quo-ta-ni a-que-tsi.

021207.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᎾᏓᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᏭᏘᏰᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;  Ꭷ, ᎡᏗᎷᎦ, ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗᏃ ᎤᏘᏰᏗ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
021207.english: But those husbandmen said among themselves, This is the heir; come, let us kill him, and the inheritance shall be ours.
021207.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-gi na tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, hi-a ni-du-na-da-we-se-le-i, Hi-a na-s-gi tsu-gv-wa-lo-di wu-ti-ye-li-hi-s-di ge-sv-i;  ka, e-di-lu-ga, tsu-gv-wa-lo-di-no u-ti-ye-di i-ga-tse-li-ga ge-se-s-di.

021208.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏂᏴᎲᏃ ᎬᏩᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒ ᏙᏱᏗᏢ ᏫᎬᏩᏓᎢᏅᏎᎢ.
021208.english: And they took him, and killed him, and cast him out of the vineyard.
021208.phonetic: Gv-wa-ni-yv-hv-no gv-wa-le-i, a-le te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv do-yi-di-tlv wi-gv-wa-da-i-nv-se-i.

021209.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏛᏛᏁᎵ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ?  ᏓᎦᎷᏥ ᎠᎴ ᏙᏛᏛᏔᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏠᎨᏏ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏙᏛᏁᎵ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᏓᏫᏒᎢ.
021209.english: What shall therefore the lord of the vineyard do? he will come and destroy the husbandmen, and will give the vineyard unto others.
021209.phonetic: Ga-do-no na-s-gi dv-dv-ne-li te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv u-tse-li-ga?  Da-ga-lu-tsi a-le do-dv-dv-ta-ni na-s-gi tlo-ge-si tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, a-le nv-wa-na-da-le do-dv-ne-li te-lv-la-di da-wi-sv-i.

021210.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪᏃ ᏱᏥᎪᎵᏰᎣ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ?  ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏯ, ᏗᎾᏁᏍᎨᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏲᎢᏎᎸᎯ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎤᏅᏏᏴ ᎠᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ;
021210.english: And have ye not read this scripture; The stone which the builders rejected is become the head of the corner:
021210.phonetic: Tla-s-go-no yi-tsi-go-li-ye-o hi-a na-s-gi tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la?  Na-s-gi nv-ya, di-na-ne-s-ge-s-gi u-ni-yo-i-se-lv-hi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv u-nv-si-yv a-di nu-li-s-ta-nv;

021211.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏄᏛᏁᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᏕᏓᎧᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
021211.english: This was the Lord's doing, and it is marvellous in our eyes?
021211.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a Yi-ho-wa nu-dv-ne-lv, a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu de-da-ka-ni-s-gv-i.

021212.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏁᎶᏔᏁᏃ ᎬᏩᏂᏴᏗᏱ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏂᏍᎦᎢᎮᎢ; ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎮᏰᏃ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏥᏛᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎢ; ᎢᎬᏩᏓᏅᎡᎴᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏁᏅᏎᎢ.
021212.english: And they sought to lay hold on him, but feared the people: for they knew that he had spoken the parable against them: and they left him, and went their way.
021212.phonetic: U-na-ne-lo-ta-ne-no gv-wa-ni-yv-di-yi, a-se-no u-ni-tsa-ti yv-wi da-ni-s-ga-i-he-i; a-ni-ga-ta-he-ye-no u-nv-sv ge-tsi-dv-gv na-s-gi du-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-i; i-gv-wa-da-nv-e-le-no a-le du-ne-nv-se-i.

021213.cherokee: ᏚᏂᏅᏎᏃ ᏫᎬᏩᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏆᎵᏏ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᏛ ᎬᏩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ, ᎤᏂᏌᏛᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎨ ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
021213.english: And they send unto him certain of the Pharisees and of the Herodians, to catch him in his words.
021213.phonetic: Du-ni-nv-se-no wi-gv-wa-lu-tse-di-yi gi-lo i-yu-na-s-di A-ni-qua-li-si a-le E-lo-dv gv-wa-s-de-li-s-gi, u-ni-sa-dv-di-yi u-na-du-li-s-ge ga-wo-ni-s-gv-i.

021214.cherokee: ᎤᏂᎷᏨᏃ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎯᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏂᏖᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᏴᏫ ᏱᏖᎸᏉᏙᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏅᏅ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏒ ᏕᎭᏕᏲᎲᏍᎪᎢ; ᏚᏳᎪᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎠᎾᎫᏱᏍᎬ ᏏᏌ ᎠᎫᏴᎡᏗᏱ, ᏝᎨ?
021214.english: And when they were come, they say unto him, Master, we know that thou art true, and carest for no man: for thou regardest not the person of men, but teachest the way of God in truth: Is it lawful to give tribute to Caesar, or not?
021214.phonetic: U-ni-lu-tsv-no, hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, o-tsi-ga-ta-ha du-yu-go-dv hi-wo-ni-s-gv ge-sv-i, a-le gi-lo ni-te-na-ye-s-gv-na ge-sv-i; v-tla-ye-no nu-na-s-dv yv-wi yi-te-lv-quo-do-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni u-nv-nv u-do-hi-yu-sv de-ha-de-yo-hv-s-go-i; du-yu-go-di-s-go a-ye-li a-na-gu-yi-s-gv Si-sa a-gu-yv-e-di-yi, tla-ge?

021215.cherokee: ᏓᏲᏥᏂᏧ, ᏝᎨ ᏴᏓᏲᏥᏂ?  ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᎦᏔᎮ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏛᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᏍᎩᎪᎵᏰᎭ?  ᎡᏍᎩᎥᏏ ᎠᎩᏏ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ.
021215.english: Shall we give, or shall we not give? But he, knowing their hypocrisy, said unto them, Why tempt ye me? bring me a penny, that I may see it.
021215.phonetic: Da-yo-tsi-ni-tsu, tla-ge yv-da-yo-tsi-ni?  A-se-no a-ga-ta-he u-na-tlo-na-s-dv-i, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ga-do-no i-s-gi-go-li-ye-ha?  E-s-gi-v-si a-gi-si tsu-gv-wa-lo-di na-s-gi a-gi-go-wa-dv-di-yi.

021216.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏲᎴᏃ.  ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎦᎪ ᎯᎠ ᏓᎦᏟᎶᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎪ ᎠᏥᏃᎮᎭ ᎯᎠ ᏥᎦᏪᎳ?  ᏏᏌ, ᎢᎬᏬᏎᎴᎢ.
021216.english: And they brought it. And he saith unto them, Whose is this image and superscription? And they said unto him, Caesar's.
021216.phonetic: U-ni-yo-le-no.  Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, Ga-go hi-a da-ga-tli-lo-s-di, a-le ga-go a-tsi-no-he-ha hi-a tsi-ga-we-la?  Si-sa, i-gv-wo-se-le-i.

021217.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏟ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏑᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏏᏌ ᎡᏣᎫᏴᏏ ᏏᏌ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.  ᎢᎬᏩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏎᎴᏃ.
021217.english: And Jesus answering said unto them, Render to Caesar the things that are Caesar's, and to God the things that are God's. And they marvelled at him.
021217.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tli hi-a ni-su-we-se-le-i, Si-sa e-tsa-gu-yv-si Si-sa u-tse-li-ga, U-ne-la-nv-hi-no U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga.  I-gv-wa-s-qua-ni-go-se-le-no.

021218.cherokee: ᏃᏆᎴ ᎠᏂᏌᏚᏏ ᎢᎬᏩᎷᏤᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎱᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎠᎾᏗᏍᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏩᏛᏛᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ.
021218.english: Then come unto him the Sadducees, which say there is no resurrection; and they asked him, saying,
021218.phonetic: No-qua-le A-ni-sa-du-si i-gv-wa-lu-tse-le-i, na-s-gi a-yo-hu-sv v-tla di-le-hi-so-di yi-gi a-na-di-s-gi; a-le i-gv-wa-dv-dv-ne-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i.

021219.cherokee: ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎼᏏ ᎣᎪᏪᎳᏁᎸᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏃᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎢᎦᎧᎯᏯᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏧᏪᏥᏃ ᏂᏗᎦᎧᎯᏯᏍᎬᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎠᏯᏂᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏓᏛᎯᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
021219.english: Master, Moses wrote unto us, If a man's brother die, and leave his wife behind him, and leave no children, that his brother should take his wife, and raise up seed unto his brother.
021219.phonetic: Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, Mo-si o-go-we-la-ne-lv-gi hi-a no-gi-we-se-lv-gi, A-na-li-nv-tli gi-lo a-yo-hu-s-ge-s-di, a-le u-da-li-i i-ga-ka-hi-ya-s-ge-s-di, tsu-we-tsi-no ni-di-ga-ka-hi-ya-s-gv-na i-ge-se-s-di, a-na-li-nv-tli a-ya-ni-s-ge-s-di u-da-li-i, a-le na-s-gi a-na-li-nv-tli tsu-we-tsi da-dv-hi-s-da-ne-he-s-di.

021220.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎠᏁᎲᎩ;  ᎢᎬᏱᏃ ᎡᎯ ᎤᏕᏒᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎩ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎾᏁᎲᎾ.
021220.english: Now there were seven brethren: and the first took a wife, and dying left no seed.
021220.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ga-li-quo-gi a-na-li-nv-tli a-ne-hv-gi;  i-gv-yi-no e-hi u-de-sv-nv-gi, a-le u-yo-hu-sv-gi tsu-we-tsi na-ne-hv-na.

021221.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᏪᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏴᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎩ; ᎾᏍᏉᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎥᏝ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏱᏚᏪᎧᎯᏰᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏦᎢᏁ ᏪᎯ.
021221.english: And the second took her, and died, neither left he any seed: and the third likewise.
021221.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no we-hi na-s-gi u-da-yv-sv-gi, a-le u-yo-hu-sv-gi; na-s-quo-no na-s-gi v-tla tsu-we-tsi yi-du-we-ka-hi-ye-i; a-le na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo tso-i-ne we-hi.

021222.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎵᏉᎩ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎤᎾᏓᏴᏒᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏚᏂᎯᎧᎯᏰ ᏧᏁᏥ; ᎣᏂᏱᏃ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏲᎱᏎᎢ.
021222.english: And the seven had her, and left no seed: last of all the woman died also.
021222.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi ga-li-quo-gi i-ya-ni-dv u-na-da-yv-sv-gi, a-le v-tla yi-du-ni-hi-ka-hi-ye tsu-ne-tsi; o-ni-yi-no a-ge-yv na-s-quo u-yo-hu-se-i.

021223.cherokee: ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯᏃ ᏧᎾᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏓᎾᎴᎯᏌᏅᎭ, ᎦᎪ ᎤᏓᎵᎢ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ?  ᎦᎵᏉᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎠᎾᏓᏰᎲᎩ.
021223.english: In the resurrection therefore, when they shall rise, whose wife shall she be of them? for the seven had her to wife.
021223.phonetic: Tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi-no tsu-na-le-hi-so-di ge-sv-i, na-hi-yu na-s-gi hi-a da-na-le-hi-sa-nv-ha, ga-go u-da-li-i ge-se-s-di na-s-gi hi-a?  Ga-li-quo-gi-ye-no i-ya-ni-dv a-na-da-ye-hv-gi.

021224.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏥᎵᏓᏍᏗᎭ, ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏂᏦᎵᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎪᏪᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ?
021224.english: And Jesus answering said unto them, Do ye not therefore err, because ye know not the scriptures, neither the power of God?
021224.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-lv-gi, Tla-s-go yi-tsi-li-da-s-di-ha, yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha ni-tso-li-gv-na ge-sv Go-we-li, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv-i?

021225.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᏧᎾᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏓᎾᏕᏒᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏱᏗᎨᏥᏰᎪᎢ;  ᎦᎸᎳᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎾᏍᏗ.
021225.english: For when they shall rise from the dead, they neither marry, nor are given in marriage; but are as the angels which are in heaven.
021225.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-ye-no tsu-na-le-hi-so-di ge-sv tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi, v-tla yi-da-na-de-sv-hv-s-go-i, v-tla a-le yi-di-ge-tsi-ye-go-i;  ga-lv-la-di-s-gi-ni a-ne-hi ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di nu-na-s-dv na-s-gi-ya nu-na-s-di.

021226.cherokee: ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏝᏍᎪ ᏱᏥᎪᎵᏰᎣ ᎼᏏ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎪᏪᎵᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏲᏓᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏃᎮᏔᏅᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎸᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏆᎭᎻ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏏᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏤᎦᏈ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
021226.english: And as touching the dead, that they rise: have ye not read in the book of Moses, how in the bush God spake unto him, saying, I am the God of Abraham, and the God of Isaac, and the God of Jacob?
021226.phonetic: Tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi-no na-s-gi tsu-na-le-hi-so-di ge-sv-i; tla-s-go yi-tsi-go-li-ye-o Mo-si u-tse-li go-we-li-hi, na-s-gi u-we-yo-da-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-li-no-he-ta-nv-i, hi-a nu-we-se-lv-i, A-yv A-qua-ne-la-nv-hi E-qua-ha-mi u-tse-li-ga, a-le A-qua-ne-la-nv-hi E-si-gi u-tse-li-ga, a-le A-qua-ne-la-nv-hi Tse-ga-qui u-tse-li-ga.

021227.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᏗᏅᏃᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏥᎵᏓᏍᏗᎭ.
021227.english: He is not the God of the dead, but the God of the living: ye therefore do greatly err.
021227.phonetic: V-tla tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi u-na-tse-li U-ne-la-nv-hi yi-gi, di-nv-no-dv-s-gi-ni u-na-tse-li U-ne-la-nv-hi; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-tsa-ti i-tsi-li-da-s-di-ha.

021228.cherokee: ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎤᎷᏤᎸ, ᎤᏛᎦᏅ ᎠᎾᎵᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎴᎰᏒ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏄᏪᏒ ᏚᏁᏤᎸᎢ, ᎤᏛᏛᏁᎢ, ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?  ᎤᏛᏁᎢ.
021228.english: And one of the scribes came, and having heard them reasoning together, and perceiving that he had answered them well, asked him, Which is the first commandment of all?
021228.phonetic: Di-no-we-li-s-gi-no ge-sv a-si-yv-wi u-lu-tse-lv, u-dv-ga-nv a-na-li-no-he-s-gv-i, a-le u-do-le-ho-sv o-si-yu nu-we-sv du-ne-tse-lv-i, u-dv-dv-ne-i, Ga-do u-s-di u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu ni-ga-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ge-sv-i?  U-dv-ne-i.

021229.cherokee: ᏥᏌ ᎤᏁᏤᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᎭᏛᎬᎦ ᎢᏏᎵ; ᏱᎰᏩ ᎢᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏌᏉᎯᏳ ᏱᎰᏩ;
021229.english: And Jesus answered him, The first of all the commandments is, Hear, O Israel; The Lord our God is one Lord:
021229.phonetic: Tsi-sa u-ne-tse-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, U-tli ga-lv-quo-di ni-ga-dv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ge-sv hi-a na-s-gi; Ha-dv-gv-ga I-si-li; Yi-ho-wa I-ga-ne-la-nv-hi sa-quo-hi-yu Yi-ho-wa;

021230.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᏱᎰᏩ ᏣᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎲᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏂᎬ ᏣᎾᏫ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬᏣᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬ ᏣᏓᏅᏖᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏣᎵᏂᎬᎬᎢ.  ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏭᏓᎪᎾᏛᏛ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ.
021230.english: And thou shalt love the Lord thy God with all thy heart, and with all thy soul, and with all thy mind, and with all thy strength: this is the first commandment.
021230.phonetic: A-le hi-ge-yu-se-s-di Yi-ho-wa Tsa-ne-la-nv-hi hv-di-s-ge-s-di ni-gv tsa-na-wi, a-le ni-gv-tsa-da-nv-do, a-le ni-gv tsa-da-nv-te-di-yi, a-le ni-ga-v tsa-li-ni-gv-gv-i.  Hi-a na-s-gi wu-da-go-na-dv-dv ga-lv-quo-di di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di.

021231.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏗ, ᏨᏒ ᏂᏣᏓᎨᏳᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎨᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏗᏍᏓᏓᎳ.  ᎥᏝ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏯᎭ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ.
021231.english: And the second is like, namely this, Thou shalt love thy neighbour as thyself. There is none other commandment greater than these.
021231.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-ya-quo, hi-a na-s-gi nu-s-di, tsv-sv ni-tsa-da-ge-yu-sv na-s-gi-ya ni-ge-yu-se-s-di na-v i-di-s-da-da-la.  V-tla nv-wa-da-le di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ya-ha u-tli i-ga-lv-quo-di e-s-ga-quo na-s-gi.

021232.cherokee: ᏗᎪᏪᎵᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ; Ꭷ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏂᏫ; ᏌᏉᏉᏰᏃ ᎡᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏰᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒᎯᏳ;
021232.english: And the scribe said unto him, Well, Master, thou hast said the truth: for there is one God; and there is none other but he:
021232.phonetic: Di-go-we-li-s-gi-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i; Ka, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, du-yu-go-dv ni-wi; sa-quo-quo-ye-no e-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi; v-tla a-le nv-wa-da-le ye-ha na-s-gi u-wa-sv-hi-yu;

021233.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᎨᏳᏗᏱ ᎬᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎬ ᎣᎾᏫᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏃᎵᏂᎬᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎥ ᎢᏳᎾᏓᎳ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏓᎨᏳᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᎨᏳᏗᏱ, ᎤᏟ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏗᎬᏩᏃᏍᏛ ᎠᏥᎸ ᏗᎨᎳᏍᏙᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵᏍᎪᎸᏙᏗ.
021233.english: And to love him with all the heart, and with all the understanding, and with all the soul, and with all the strength, and to love his neighbour as himself, is more than all whole burnt offerings and sacrifices.
021233.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-ge-yu-di-yi gv-do-di-yi ni-gv o-na-wi-yi, a-le ni-gv a-da-nv-te-di-yi, a-le ni-gv a-da-nv-do, a-le ni-ga-v no-li-ni-gv-gv-i, a-le na-v i-yu-na-da-la u-wa-sv u-da-ge-yu-sv na-s-gi-ya u-ge-yu-di-yi, u-tli ga-lv-quo-di-yu e-s-ga-quo ni-ga-dv di-gv-wa-no-s-dv a-tsi-lv di-ge-la-s-do-di, a-le a-li-s-go-lv-do-di.

021234.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᎪᎲ ᎠᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢ ᎢᏳᏪᏍᏗ ᏄᏪᏒ ᎤᏁᏨᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎢᏅᎯᏳ ᏱᏂᏣᏛᎿᎭᏕᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎾᎯᏳᏃ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
021234.english: And when Jesus saw that he answered discreetly, he said unto him, Thou art not far from the kingdom of God. And no man after that durst ask him any question.
021234.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-go-hv a-ga-ta-hna-i i-yu-we-s-di nu-we-sv u-ne-tsv-i, hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, V-tla i-nv-hi-yu yi-ni-tsa-dv-hna-de-ga U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-go-hi ge-sv-i.  Na-hi-yu-no i-yu-da-le-nv-dv v-tla gi-lo go-hu-s-di gv-wa-dv-dv-di yi-ge-se-i.

021235.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᎤᏛᏅᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᏣᎾᏗᏍᎪᎢ?
021235.english: And Jesus answered and said, while he taught in the temple, How say the scribes that Christ is the Son of David?
021235.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv da-de-yo-hv-s-gv u-dv-nv-di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, hi-a nu-we-se-i; Ga-do-no di-no-we-li-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv De-wi u-we-tsi, tsa-na-di-s-go-i?

021236.cherokee: ᏕᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏪᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏱᎰᏩ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏥᎦᏘᏏ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏦᎴᏍᏗ ᎬᏂ ᎨᏣᏍᎦᎩ ᏗᏣᎳᏏᏗᏱ ᎦᏍᎩᎶ ᏂᎦᏥᏴᏁᎸᎭ.
021236.english: For David himself said by the Holy Ghost, The Lord said to my Lord, Sit thou on my right hand, till I make thine enemies thy footstool.
021236.phonetic: De-wi-ye-no u-wa-sv Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do u-we-yo-hv-s-gv hi-a nu-we-se-i, Yi-ho-wa hi-a nu-we-se-le a-qua-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi, Tsi-ga-ti-si i-di-tlv tso-le-s-di gv-ni ge-tsa-s-ga-gi di-tsa-la-si-di-yi ga-s-gi-lo ni-ga-tsi-yv-ne-lv-ha.

021237.cherokee: ᏕᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎪᏎᎭ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᏗᎦᎴᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎢᎩ?  ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᎵᎮᎵᏨᎯ ᎬᏩᏛᏓᏁᎴᎢ.
021237.english: David therefore himself calleth him Lord; and whence is he then his son? And the common people heard him gladly.
021237.phonetic: De-wi-ye-no u-wa-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-go-se-ha; ga-do-no di-ga-le-s-do-di-ha u-we-tsi i-gi?  U-ni-tsa-ti-no yv-wi u-na-li-he-li-tsv-hi gv-wa-dv-da-ne-le-i.

021238.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᏕᏤᏯᏙᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏧᏂᏰᎸ ᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᏧᎾᏄᏩᎢ ᎤᏁᏓᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᏲᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᎦᏃᏙᏗᏱ,
021238.english: And he said unto them in his doctrine, Beware of the scribes, which love to go in long clothing, and love salutations in the marketplaces,
021238.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le da-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i, De-tse-ya-do-tse-he-s-di di-no-we-li-s-gi o-si-yu tsu-ni-ye-lv di-ga-nv-hi-dv tsu-na-nu-wa-i u-ne-da-s-di-yi, a-le ge-tsi-yo-li-s-di-yi di-ga-no-do-di-yi,

021239.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏕᎦᏍᎩᎸ ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏧᎾᏂᏢᏗᏱ ᏓᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᎬᎢ;
021239.english: And the chief seats in the synagogues, and the uppermost rooms at feasts:
021239.phonetic: A-le nu-gv-wi-yu-sv de-ga-s-gi-lv di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-le nu-gv-wi-yu-sv tsu-na-ni-tlv-di-yi da-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-gv-i;

021240.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏓᏂᏒᏁᎰ ᏧᏃᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᏓᏂᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏛ ᎪᎯᏗᏳ ᏣᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎤᏂᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᏗᎨᎫᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
021240.english: Which devour widows' houses, and for a pretence make long prayers: these shall receive greater damnation.
021240.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-da-ni-sv-ne-ho tsu-no-su-lo-tsv-hi da-ni-ne-lv-i, a-le u-na-tlo-na-s-dv go-hi-di-yu tsa-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-go-i; hi-a na-s-gi u-tli i-ga-i u-ni-gi-li-yo-i-s-di di-ge-gu-go-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di.

021241.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏬᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏗᏗᏱ ᏧᏳᎪᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎪᎮ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᏴᏫ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏓᏂᎲᏍᎬ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏗᏗᏱ; ᎤᏂᏣᏘᏃ ᏧᏁᎿᎭᎢ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏓᏂᎲᏍᎨᎢ.
021241.english: And Jesus sat over against the treasury, and beheld how the people cast money into the treasury: and many that were rich cast in much.
021241.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-wo-le a-de-lv--di-di-yi tsu-yu-go-di, a-le u-go-he na-na-dv-ne-hv yv-wi a-de-lv da-ni-hv-s-gv a-de-lv--di-di-yi; u-ni-tsa-ti-no tsu-ne-hna-i u-tsa-ti da-ni-hv-s-ge-i.

021242.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎤᏬᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᎤᎷᏨ, ᏔᎵ ᎠᎩᏄᏛᏗ ᎢᏯᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎤᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎢᏯᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏥᎩ.
021242.english: And there came a certain poor widow, and she threw in two mites, which make a farthing.
021242.phonetic: Gi-lo-no i-yu-s-di u-yo i-yu-dv-hna-de-gi u-wo-su-lo-tsv-hi u-lu-tsv, ta-li a-gi-nu-dv-di i-ya-da-nv-te-di u-ne-i, na-s-gi a-ye-li i-ya-da-nv-te-di i-ga-i tsi-gi.

021243.cherokee: ᏫᏚᏯᏅᎲᏃ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎤᏬᏑᎶᏨᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎠᎲᎦ ᎡᏍᎦᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏕᎸ-ᏗᏗᏱ ᏣᏂᎲᎦ.
021243.english: And he called unto him his disciples, and saith unto them, Verily I say unto you, That this poor widow hath cast more in, than all they which have cast into the treasury:
021243.phonetic: Wi-du-ya-nv-hv-no gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, Hi-a na-s-gi u-yo i-yu-dv-hna-de-gi u-wo-su-lo-tsv-hi u-tli i-ga-i a-hv-ga e-s-ga-quo ni-ga-dv na-s-gi a-de-lv--di-di-yi tsa-ni-hv-ga.

021244.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏛᏰᏃ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏂᎲ ᎤᏃᏣᎴᏛ ᎠᏂᎲᎦ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ-ᎤᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎲᎦ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎲᎢ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎤᎲᎢ.
021244.english: For all they did cast in of their abundance; but she of her want did cast in all that she had, even all her living.
021244.phonetic: Ni-ga-dv-ye-no u-tsa-ti u-ni-hv u-no-tsa-le-dv a-ni-hv-ga; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni--u-ni-gi-dv ge-sv a-hv-ga ni-ga-dv u-hv-i, ni-ga-dv u-li-s-de-lv-do-di u-hv-i.

021301.cherokee: ᎦᏄᎪᎮᏃ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏔᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ Ꮎ ᏂᏕᎤᏍᏗ ᏅᏯ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏕᎤᏍᏗ ᏓᏓᏁ-ᎸᎢ?
021301.english: And as he went out of the temple, one of his disciples saith unto him, Master, see what manner of stones and what buildings are here!
021301.phonetic: Ga-nu-go-he-no u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, a-si-yv-wi na-s-gi gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ta-de-yo-hv-s-gi, gv-ni-yu-quo na ni-de-u-s-di nv-ya a-le ni-de-u-s-di da-da-ne--lv-i?

021302.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏕᎯᎪᏩᏗᏍᎪ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏤᏆ ᏓᏓᏁᎸᎢ?  ᎥᏝ ᏌᏉ ᏅᏯ ᎧᏃᎯᏴᎯ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏱᏚᏓᏌᏝᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎪᎲᏔᏅᎾ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
021302.english: And Jesus answering said unto him, Seest thou these great buildings? there shall not be left one stone upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
021302.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, De-hi-go-wa-di-s-go hi-a na-s-gi tse-qua da-da-ne-lv-i?  V-tla sa-quo nv-ya ka-no-hi-yv-hi yi-ge-se-s-di yi-du-da-sa-tla-he-s-di, na-s-gi ni-go-hv-ta-nv-na yi-ge-se-s-di.

021303.cherokee: ᎣᎵᏩᏲᏃ ᎤᏌᎯᎸ ᎤᏬᎸᎢ, ᎤᏛᏅᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏧᏳᎪᏗ, ᏈᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎻ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᏂᏗ, ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏩᏛᏛᏁᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ,
021303.english: And as he sat upon the mount of Olives over against the temple, Peter and James and John and Andrew asked him privately,
021303.phonetic: O-li-wa-yo-no u-sa-hi-lv u-wo-lv-i, u-dv-nv-di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi a-da-ne-lv tsu-yu-go-di, Qui-da, a-le Tsi-mi, a-le Tsa-ni, a-le E-ni-di, u-nv-sv ge-sv gv-wa-dv-dv-ne-i, hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i,

021304.cherokee: ᏍᎩᏃᎲᏏ, ᎢᎳᎩᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ?
021304.english: Tell us, when shall these things be? and what shall be the sign when all these things shall be fulfilled?
021304.phonetic: S-gi-no-hv-si, i-la-gi-yu na-s-gi hi-a nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni?  A-le ga-do u-ye-lv-dv ge-se-s-di na-hi-yu hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-dv u-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i?

021305.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏚᏁᏤᎸ, ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᏥᏥᎶᏄᎮᎵ.
021305.english: And Jesus answering them began to say, Take heed lest any man deceive you:
021305.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no du-ne-tse-lv, u-le-nv-he hi-a nu-we-se-i, I-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di, tle-s-di gi-lo tsi-tsi-lo-nu-he-li.

021306.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏓᏆᏙᏍᏛ ᎠᏂᎷᎯᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏍᏗ ᏓᏂᎶᏄᎮᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
021306.english: For many shall come in my name, saying, I am Christ; and shall deceive many.
021306.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-te-s-di-ye-no a-yv da-qua-do-s-dv a-ni-lu-hi-s-di-s-ge-s-di, hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-s-di, a-yv na-s-gi; a-le u-ni-tsa-te-s-di da-ni-lo-nu-he-s-ge-s-di.

021307.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏛᎩᏍᎨᏍᏗᏃ ᏓᏅᏩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᎵᏙᎲ ᏓᏅᏩ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᏕᏯᏔᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗ; ᎤᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏏ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
021307.english: And when ye shall hear of wars and rumours of wars, be ye not troubled: for such things must needs be; but the end shall not be yet.
021307.phonetic: I-tsa-dv-gi-s-ge-s-di-no da-nv-wa, a-le a-ni-no-he-li-do-hv da-nv-wa, tle-s-di yi-tsa-de-ya-ta-ne-he-s-di; na-s-gi-ye-no a-se i-yu-li-s-do-di; u-li-s-qua-di-s-di-yi-s-gi-ni ge-sv a-si ge-se-s-di.

021308.cherokee: ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏛᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ ᏙᏛᎾᎴᏂ ᏙᏛᎾᏓᏡᏔᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏰᎵ ᏕᎪᏢᏩᏗᏒ ᏙᏛᎾᏓᏡᏔᏂ; ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙᎯ ᏓᎵᏖᎸᏂᏙᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏓᎪᏄᎶᏏᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎮᏍᏗ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᎴᏂᏍᎬ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ.
021308.english: For nation shall rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom: and there shall be earthquakes in divers places, and there shall be famines and troubles: these are the beginnings of sorrows.
021308.phonetic: Tsu-na-da-le-dv-ye-no yv-wi do-dv-na-le-ni do-dv-na-da-tlu-ta-ni, a-le a-ye-li de-go-tlv-wa-di-sv do-dv-na-da-tlu-ta-ni; a-le ga-do-hi da-li-te-lv-ni-do-he-s-di, a-le da-go-nu-lo-si-do-he-s-di a-le u-de-ya-do-di ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-do-he-s-di; hi-a na-s-gi a-da-le-ni-s-gv a-gi-li-ya.

021309.cherokee: ᎠᏗᎾ ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ; ᏓᏂᎳᏫᎥᏰᏃ ᏕᎨᏥᏲᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᏧᏂᏔᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱᏃ ᏕᏥᎵᎥᏂᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏂᏅ ᏤᏣᏖᏃᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᎦᏘᎴᎩ.
021309.english: But take heed to yourselves: for they shall deliver you up to councils; and in the synagogues ye shall be beaten: and ye shall be brought before rulers and kings for my sake, for a testimony against them.
021309.phonetic: A-di-na i-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di; da-ni-la-wi-v-ye-no de-ge-tsi-yo-s-ge-s-di; tsu-ni-ta-wi-i-s-di-yi-no de-tsi-li-v-ni-he-s-di; a-le nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-gi a-le u-ni-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ni-nv tse-tsa-te-no-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di a-yv ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di-s-gi tsu-ni-ga-ti-le-gi.

021310.cherokee: ᎣᏍᏛᏃ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᏧᏁᏩᏗᏒ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
021310.english: And the gospel must first be published among all nations.
021310.phonetic: O-s-dv-no ka-no-he-dv i-gv-yi ni-gv-na-dv tsu-ne-wa-di-sv yv-wi a-li-tsi-do-di ge-se-s-di.

021311.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏕᏣᏘᏁᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏥᏲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎦᏰᎯ ᏱᏤᎵᎯᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏪᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎦᏰᎯ ᏱᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᏄᏍᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏫᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎡᏥᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏁᎨᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏱᏣᏁᎪᎢ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ.
021311.english: But when they shall lead you, and deliver you up, take no thought beforehand what ye shall speak, neither do ye premeditate: but whatsoever shall be given you in that hour, that speak ye: for it is not ye that speak, but the Holy Ghost.
021311.phonetic: A-le hna-quo de-tsa-ti-ne-ge-s-di, a-le de-tsi-yo-s-ge-s-di, tle-s-di i-gv-yi ga-ye-hi yi-tse-li-hi-s-ge-s-di i-tsi-we-s-di-yi i-tsi-ne-i-s-di-yi, a-le tle-s-di i-gv-yi ga-ye-hi yi-tsa-da-nv-te-s-ge-s-di; nu-s-dv-s-gi-ni wi-hi-yu ge-sv e-tsi-ne-lv na-s-gi i-tsi-ne-ge-s-di; v-tla-ye-no ni-hi yi-tsa-ne-go-i, Ga-lv-quo-di-yu-s-gi-ni A-da-nv-do.

021312.cherokee: ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟᏃ ᏚᏲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎤᏲᎱᎯᎯᏍᏗᏱ; ᎠᏍᎦᏯᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏚᏲᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᎦᏅᎩ ᏓᎾᎴᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏧᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏓᎾᏡᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏅᏂᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏕᎨᏥᎢᎮᏍᏗ.
021312.english: Now the brother shall betray the brother to death, and the father the son; and children shall rise up against their parents, and shall cause them to be put to death.
021312.phonetic: A-na-li-nv-tli-no du-yo-s-ge-s-di a-na-li-nv-tli u-yo-hu-hi-hi-s-di-yi; a-s-ga-ya-no u-we-tsi du-yo-s-ge-s-di; a-le di-ge-ga-nv-gi da-na-le-hv-s-ge-s-di tsu-ni-ga-yv-li-ge da-na-tlu-di-s-ge-s-di, a-le na-s-gi na-nv-ni-si-s-ge-s-di de-ge-tsi-i-he-s-di.

021313.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏴᏫ ᎨᏥᏍᎦᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏧᏆᏙᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎩᎶᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏕᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
021313.english: And ye shall be hated of all men for my name's sake: but he that shall endure unto the end, the same shall be saved.
021313.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-di-yu yv-wi ge-tsi-s-ga-gi ge-se-s-di a-yv tsu-qua-do-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di; gi-lo-s-gi-ni gv-li-s-qua-di-s-gi di-ka-hna-wa-de-gi, na-s-gi a-tsi-s-de-lv-di ge-se-s-di.

021314.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏍᎦᎢᏍᏗ ᎠᏛᏗᏍᎩ ᏕᏂᎵ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ, ᎦᏙᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᎿᎭᎬᏩᎴᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, (ᎩᎶ ᎠᎪᎵᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎪᎵᎨᏍᏗ,) ᎿᎭᏉ ᏧᏗᏱ ᎠᏂᏂ ᎠᎾᎵᏒᎭ ᏙᏦᏓᎸ ᏩᏂᎶᏒᎭ.
021314.english: But when ye shall see the abomination of desolation, spoken of by Daniel the prophet, standing where it ought not, (let him that readeth understand,) then let them that be in Judaea flee to the mountains:
021314.phonetic: I-tsi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni u-s-ga-i-s-di a-dv-di-s-gi De-ni-li a-do-le-ho-s-gi u-ne-i-s-ta-nv-hi, ga-do-ge-s-di na-hna gv-wa-le-di ni-ge-sv-na, (gi-lo a-go-li-ye-s-ge-s-di go-li-ge-s-di,) hna-quo Tsu-di-yi a-ni-ni a-na-li-sv-ha do-tso-da-lv wa-ni-lo-sv-ha.

021315.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎦᏌᎾᎵ ᎤᎩᎴᏍᏗ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᏴᏗᏠᎠᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏫᏯᏴᎯᎮᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎾᎿ ᎭᏫᏯᏴᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᏭᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎿᎭᎥ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ.
021315.english: And let him that is on the housetop not go down into the house, neither enter therein, to take any thing out of his house:
021315.phonetic: A-le gi-lo ga-sa-na-li u-gi-le-s-di, tle-s-di yv-di-tlo-a-s-ge-s-di a-da-ne-lv wi-ya-yv-hi-he-s-di, a-le tle-s-di na-hna wi-ya-yv-hi-he-s-di wu-gi-s-di-yi go-hu-s-di u-hna-v ga-ne-lv-i.

021316.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᏠᎨᏏ ᎡᏙᎯ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏴᏗᎤᏨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏄᏬ ᏳᏁᏐᎴᏍᏗ.
021316.english: And let him that is in the field not turn back again for to take up his garment.
021316.phonetic: A-le gi-lo tlo-ge-si e-do-hi tle-s-di yv-di-u-tsv-se-s-di u-nu-wo yu-ne-so-le-s-di.

021317.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏂᏁᎵᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏍᏓᎢ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
021317.english: But woe to them that are with child, and to them that give suck in those days!
021317.phonetic: A-le u-yo-i-yu i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di di-ni-ne-li-dv, a-le tsu-ni-s-da-i na-hi-yu ge-se-s-di.

021318.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏔᏲᎯᎮᏍᏗ ᎪᎳ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
021318.english: And pray ye that your flight be not in the winter.
021318.phonetic: A-le i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di i-tsi-ta-yo-hi-he-s-di go-la i-tsa-li-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

021319.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ ᎡᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᏢᏅᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏬᏢᏁ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎪᎯ ᎢᏯᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏳᏕᏃᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏕᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
021319.english: For in those days shall be affliction, such as was not from the beginning of the creation which God created unto this time, neither shall be.
021319.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-ye-no ge-se-s-di a-gi-li-ya e-he-s-di, na-s-gi go-tlv-nv-i na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-wo-tlv-ne nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv go-hi i-ya-s-di v-tla na-s-gi i-yu-s-di yu-de-no-i, v-tla a-le u-de-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

021320.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏂᏚᎪᎳᏛᎾ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏱᎦᏰᏥᏍᏕᎸᎮᎢ; ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏑᏰᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᎪᎳᏛ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ.
021320.english: And except that the Lord had shortened those days, no flesh should be saved: but for the elect's sake, whom he hath chosen, he hath shortened the days.
021320.phonetic: A-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi ni-du-go-la-dv-na yi-ge-se na-hi-yu i-ga, v-tla u-que-da-li yi-ga-ye-tsi-s-de-lv-he-i; ge-ga-su-ye-dv-s-gi-ni nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, na-s-gi tsu-su-ye-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi du-go-la-dv na-hi-yu i-ga.

021321.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎢᏳ ᎩᎶ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏎᎸᎭ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏂ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ; ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎾᎿᎭᏂ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏦᎢᏳᏅᎩ;
021321.english: And then if any man shall say to you, Lo, here is Christ; or, lo, he is there; believe him not:
021321.phonetic: Hna-quo-no i-yu gi-lo hi-a ni-tsi-we-se-lv-ha, Gv-ni-yu-quo a-ni Ga-lo-ne-dv; a-le gv-ni-yu-quo na-hna-ni; tle-s-di i-tso-i-yu-nv-gi;

021322.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏰᏃ ᎤᎾᏤᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏤᎸᎯ ᏛᏂᎾᏄᎪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎾᏄᎪᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏰᎸᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᎶᏄᎮᏗᏱ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏛ.
021322.english: For false Christs and false prophets shall rise, and shall shew signs and wonders, to seduce, if it were possible, even the elect.
021322.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-ye-no u-na-tse-lv-hi a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi u-na-tse-lv-hi dv-ni-na-nu-go-tsi, a-le a-ni-na-nu-go-wi-s-ge-s-di u-ye-lv-dv a-le u-s-qua-ni-go-di, na-s-gi tsu-ni-lo-nu-he-di-yi, i-yu-no ye-li yi-gi, na-s-quo ge-ga-su-ye-dv.

021323.english: But take ye heed: behold, I have foretold you all things.

021324.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᎶᏐᏁᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ, ᏅᏙ ᎢᎦ ᎡᎯ ᏛᎵᏏᎲᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏙ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎡᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎦ ᏳᏖᏍᏕᏗ;
021324.english: But in those days, after that tribulation, the sun shall be darkened, and the moon shall not give her light,
021324.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-s-gi-ni ge-se-s-di, u-lo-so-ne-s-di na-s-gi a-gi-li-ya, nv-do i-ga e-hi dv-li-si-hv-si, a-le nv-do sv-no-yi e-hi v-tla i-ga yu-te-s-de-di;

021325.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏃᏈᏏ ᎠᏂᎧᎸ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᎠᏂᏅᎪᎠᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏣᏖ ᎦᎸᎶ ᏣᏂᎧᎳ ᏛᎾᎵᏖᎸᏂ.
021325.english: And the stars of heaven shall fall, and the powers that are in heaven shall be shaken.
021325.phonetic: A-le no-qui-si a-ni-ka-lv ga-lv-lo-i a-ni-nv-go-a-s-ge-s-di, a-le u-ni-tsa-te ga-lv-lo tsa-ni-ka-la dv-na-li-te-lv-ni.

021326.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏛᏂᎪᎯ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏣᎢᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎶᎩᎸᎢ, ᎤᏄᏬᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
021326.english: And then shall they see the Son of man coming in the clouds with great power and glory.
021326.phonetic: Hna-quo-no dv-ni-go-hi yv-wi U-we-tsi tsa-i-se-s-di u-lo-gi-lv-i, u-nu-wo-s-de-s-di u-tsa-ti u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i.

021327.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏙᏓᎦᏅᏏ ᏧᏤᎵ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏓᎦᏟᏌᏂ ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏛ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᏫᏙᏛᏯᏅᎯ ᏅᎩ ᏂᏙᏗᎦᎶᏍᎬ ᎤᏃᎴ, ᎡᎶᎯ ᏭᎵᏍᏘᏂᎸ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎦᎸᎶᏃ ᏭᎵᏍᏘᏂᎸ ᏫᎦᎷᎩ.
021327.english: And then shall he send his angels, and shall gather together his elect from the four winds, from the uttermost part of the earth to the uttermost part of heaven.
021327.phonetic: Hna-quo-no do-da-ga-nv-si tsu-tse-li di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi, a-le do-da-ga-tli-sa-ni ge-ga-su-ye-dv tsu-tse-li-ga wi-do-dv-ya-nv-hi nv-gi ni-do-di-ga-lo-s-gv u-no-le, e-lo-hi wu-li-s-ti-ni-lv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-dv ga-lv-lo-no wu-li-s-ti-ni-lv wi-ga-lu-gi.

021328.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏕᎶᏆᏃ ᏒᎦᏔ-ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏡᎬ ᏓᏟᎶᏍᏛᎢ;  ᎤᏩᏂᎦᎸ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏓᎨ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎦᎵᏍᏚᎲᏍᎪᎢ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎰ ᎪᎩ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ;
021328.english: Now learn a parable of the fig tree; When her branch is yet tender, and putteth forth leaves, ye know that summer is near:
021328.phonetic: I-tsa-de-lo-qua-no sv-ga-ta--i-yu-s-di tlu-gv da-tli-lo-s-dv-i;  U-wa-ni-ga-lv hna-quo u-da-ge ni-ga-li-s-da, a-le tsi-ga-li-s-du-hv-s-go-i, i-tsi-ga-ta-ho go-gi na-v-ni-yu ge-sv-i;

021329.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏘᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎲᎢ, ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎾᎥᏂᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱᏉ ᎨᏒᎢ.
021329.english: So ye in like manner, when ye shall see these things come to pass, know that it is nigh, even at the doors.
021329.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ni-hi, hna-quo i-tsi-go-wa-ti-s-ge-s-di hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-li-s-ta-ni-do-hv-i, i-tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di na-v-ni-yu ge-sv-i, ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi-quo ge-sv-i.

021330.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎮ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᏣᏁᎭ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏛᏂᎶᏐᏂ ᎬᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏅᎭ.
021330.english: Verily I say unto you, that this generation shall not pass, till all these things be done.
021330.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-he, hi-a na-s-gi go-hi tsa-ne-ha v-tla yv-dv-ni-lo-so-ni gv-ni hi-a na-s-gi ni-ga-di-yu ni-ga-li-s-ta-nv-ha.

021331.cherokee: ᎦᎸᎶ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏛᏂᎶᏐᏂ; ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎩᏁᏨ ᎥᏝ ᏴᏓᎦᎶᏐᏂ.
021331.english: Heaven and earth shall pass away: but my words shall not pass away.
021331.phonetic: Ga-lv-lo a-le e-lo-hi dv-ni-lo-so-ni; a-yv-s-gi-ni a-gi-ne-tsv v-tla yv-da-ga-lo-so-ni.

021332.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳ ᎧᎳᏩᏗᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏯᎦᏔᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎠᏁᎯ, Ꮭ ᎾᏉᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏩᏒ.
021332.english: But of that day and that hour knoweth no man, no, not the angels which are in heaven, neither the Son, but the Father.
021332.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-s-gi-ni i-ga ge-sv a-le i-yu ka-la-wa-di-sv v-tla gi-lo ya-ga-ta-ha, v-tla na-s-quo di-ni-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ga-lv-la-di a-ne-hi, tla na-quo-no U-we-tsi, a-ga-yv-li-ge-s-gi-ni u-wa-sv.

021333.cherokee: ᎢᏤᏯᏔᎮᏍᏗ, ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
021333.english: Take ye heed, watch and pray: for ye know not when the time is.
021333.phonetic: I-tse-ya-ta-he-s-di, i-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di a-le i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di; v-tla-ye-no yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha i-yu ge-sv-i.

021334.cherokee: [ᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ] ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏣᏂᎩᏍᎪ ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᏤᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎬᏕᎪ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎦᏘᏯ ᏥᏂᏕᎬᏁᎰ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᏧᏂ ᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏥᏓᏁᎰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎦᏘᏯ ᏥᎧᏁᏤᎰ ᎤᏯᏫᏗᏱ.
021334.english: For the Son of man is as a man taking a far journey, who left his house, and gave authority to his servants, and to every man his work, and commanded the porter to watch.
021334.phonetic: [Yv-wi-ye-no U-we-tsi] na-s-gi-ya-quo a-s-ga-ya tsa-ni-gi-s-go i-lv-hi-tlv tse-go-i, na-s-gi tsi-gv-de-go ga-ne-lv-i, a-le a-ni-ga-ti-ya tsi-ni-de-gv-ne-ho tsu-nv-si-da-s-di, a-le a-ni-si-yv-wi-ha tsu-ni lv-wi-s-da-ne-di tsi-da-ne-ho-i, a-le ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi a-ga-ti-ya tsi-ka-ne-tse-ho u-ya-wi-di-yi.

021335.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏳᏉ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᏁᎳ, ᎤᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎠᏰᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᏔᎦ ᎠᏂᏴᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏑᎾᎴᎢ;
021335.english: Watch ye therefore: for ye know not when the master of the house cometh, at even, or at midnight, or at the cockcrowing, or in the morning:
021335.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di; v-tla-ye-no yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha i-yu-quo u-lu-hi-s-di-yi ga-ne-la, u-sv-i, a-le sv-no-yi a-ye-li, a-le tsa-ta-ga a-ni-yv-gv-i, a-le su-na-le-i;

021336.english: Lest coming suddenly he find you sleeping.

021337.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛᏉ ᏂᎦᏥᏪᏎᎭ-ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
021337.english: And what I say unto you I say unto all, Watch.
021337.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a ni-hi tsi-ni-tsv-we-se-ha, na-s-gi ni-ga-dv-quo ni-ga-tsi-we-se-ha--I-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di.

021401.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏃ ᏫᏄᏒᎸ ᎧᏃᎯᏴᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎪᏔᏅᎾ ᎦᏚ ᎠᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏲᎴ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏄᎮᏛ ᎤᏅᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏂᏴᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ.
021401.english: After two days was the feast of the passover, and of unleavened bread: and the chief priests and the scribes sought how they might take him by craft, and put him to death.
021401.phonetic: Ta-li-no wi-nu-sv-lv ka-no-hi-yv-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi a-le na-go-ta-nv-na ga-du a-gi-s-di-yi u-s-qua-lv-di ge-se-i, nu-ni-gv-wi-sv-no a-tsi-lv-a-ne-lo-hi a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi u-ni-yo-le i-yu-na-dv-ne-di-yi ga-lo-nu-he-dv u-nv-do-di-yi u-ni-ni-yv-di-yi, a-le u-ni-hi-s-di-yi.

021402.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏞᏍᏗ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎢᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏯᎾᎵᏕᎸᎲᎦᏰᏃ ᏴᏫ, ᎤᎾᏛᏁᎢ.
021402.english: But they said, Not on the feast day, lest there be an uproar of the people.
021402.phonetic: A-se-no v-tle-s-di di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi i-yu i-ga ge-sv-i, ya-na-li-de-lv-hv-ga-ye-no yv-wi, u-na-dv-ne-i.

021403.cherokee: ᏇᏗᏂᏱᏃ ᎡᏙᎮᎢ, ᎠᎠᏩᏂ ᎠᏓᏰᏍᎩ ᎤᏢᏨᎯ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ, ᎦᏅᎨᏃ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᎨᏴ ᎤᎷᏤ ᎠᏰᎮ ᎫᎫ ᏅᏯ ᎤᏁᎬ ᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏟᏍᏕ ᎠᏠᏁᏗ ᎾᏓ ᏧᏙᎢᏛ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᎶᏒ ᎫᎫ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎶᏁᏔᏁ ᎠᏍᎪᎵ.
021403.english: And being in Bethany in the house of Simon the leper, as he sat at meat, there came a woman having an alabaster box of ointment of spikenard very precious; and she brake the box, and poured it on his head.
021403.phonetic: Que-di-ni-yi-no e-do-he-i, Aa-wa-ni a-da-ye-s-gi u-tlv-tsv-hi ga-ne-lv-i, ga-nv-ge-no a-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-i, a-ge-yv u-lu-tse a-ye-he gu-gu nv-ya u-ne-gv go-tlv-ta-nv-hi a-tli-s-de a-tlo-ne-di na-da tsu-do-i-dv, u-tsa-ti tsu-gv-wa-lo-di; a-le u-lo-sv gu-gu, a-le u-lo-ne-ta-ne a-s-go-li.

021404.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏑᏰ ᎤᏅᏳᏤ ᏙᏧᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏂᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏤᏬᎩ ᎠᏠᏁᏗ?
021404.english: And there were some that had indignation within themselves, and said, Why was this waste of the ointment made?
021404.phonetic: Gi-lo-no u-na-da-su-ye u-nv-yu-tse do-tsu-na-da-nv-dv-i, a-le hi-a nu-ni-we-se-i, Ga-do-no hi-a a-tse-wo-gi a-tlo-ne-di?

021405.cherokee: ᏳᏂᎾᏗᏅᏎᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏠᏁᏗ ᏦᎢᏧᏈ ᎠᏂᎩᏏ ᏧᎾᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏗ ᏱᏚᎵᎬᏩᎳᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏗᎬᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.  ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᎪᏁᎶᎯᏎᎴᎢ.
021405.english: For it might have been sold for more than three hundred pence, and have been given to the poor. And they murmured against her.
021405.phonetic: Yu-ni-na-di-nv-se-ye-no na-s-gi hi-a a-tlo-ne-di tso-i-tsu-qui a-ni-gi-si tsu-na-gv-wa-lo-di u-lo-sv-s-di yi-du-li-gv-wa-la-ne-i, a-le u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi di-gv-ne-di yi-ge-se-i.  A-le gv-wa-go-ne-lo-hi-se-le-i.

021406.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᎩ; ᎦᏙᏃ ᎢᎡᏣᏕᏯᏙᏗᎭ?  ᎣᏏᏳ ᏕᎤᎸᏫᏍᏓᏏ ᏥᎾᏋᎦ.
021406.english: And Jesus said, Let her alone; why trouble ye her? she hath wrought a good work on me.
021406.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, U-ne-la-gi; ga-do-no i-e-tsa-de-ya-do-di-ha?  O-si-yu de-u-lv-wi-s-da-si tsi-na-quv-ga.

021407.cherokee: ᎤᏲᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎨᏤᎳᏗᏙᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏳᏉ ᎢᏤᎵᏍᎬᎢ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏱᏂᏕᏣᏛᏂᏏ; ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏱᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎭ.
021407.english: For ye have the poor with you always, and whensoever ye will ye may do them good: but me ye have not always.
021407.phonetic: U-yo-ye-no i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi ni-go-hi-lv ge-tse-la-di-do-ha, a-le i-yu-quo i-tse-li-s-gv-i o-s-dv yi-ni-de-tsa-dv-ni-si; a-yv-s-gi-ni v-tla ni-go-hi-lv yi-tsv-ye-la-di-do-ha.

021408.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᎬᏩᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏛᎦ; ᎢᎬᏱ ᎦᏰᎯ ᎦᎷᎩ ᎤᎶᏁᏗᏱ ᏥᏰᎴ ᎥᎩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
021408.english: She hath done what she could: she is come aforehand to anoint my body to the burying.
021408.phonetic: Ni-ga-v i-gv-wa-dv-ne-di ge-sv na-dv-ga; i-gv-yi ga-ye-hi ga-lu-gi u-lo-ne-di-yi tsi-ye-le v-gi-ni-so-di-yi u-gv-wa-li.

021409.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎢᎸᎯᏢ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎡᎶᎯ ᏂᎬᎾᏛᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎾᏛᎦ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎦᏅᏓᏗᏍᏙᏗ.
021409.english: Verily I say unto you, Wheresoever this gospel shall be preached throughout the whole world, this also that she hath done shall be spoken of for a memorial of her.
021409.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, I-lv-hi-tlv hi-a na-s-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv a-li-tsi-do-di ni-ga-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di e-lo-hi ni-gv-na-dv-i, hi-a na-s-gi tsi-na-dv-ga na-s-quo u-ni-no-he-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi a-ga-nv-da-di-s-do-di.

021410.cherokee: ᏧᏓᏏᏃ ᎢᏯᎦᎳᏗ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏪᏅᏎ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᏗᏂᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ.
021410.english: And Judas Iscariot, one of the twelve, went unto the chief priests, to betray him unto them.
021410.phonetic: Tsu-da-si-no I-ya-ga-la-di, a-si-yv-wi na-s-gi ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv-i, u-we-nv-se nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi di-ni-nv-i, na-s-gi tsu-yo-hi-se-di-yi.

021411.cherokee: ᎤᎾᏛᎦᏅᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎴ ᎠᏕᎸ ᏧᏂᏁᏗᏱ.  ᎤᏲᎴᏃ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏜᏓᏅᏓᏕᏗᏱ ᏧᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ.
021411.english: And when they heard it, they were glad, and promised to give him money. And he sought how he might conveniently betray him.
021411.phonetic: U-na-dv-ga-nv-no o-si-yu u-ni-ye-lv-ne-i, a-le u-ni-du-i-s-da-ne-le a-de-lv tsu-ni-ne-di-yi.  U-yo-le-no o-s-dv u-dla-nv-da-de-di-yi tsu-yo-hi-se-di-yi.

021412.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏱᏃ ᎢᎦ ᎾᎪᏔᏅᎾ ᎦᏚ ᎠᎩᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᏂᎸ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ, ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎭᏢ ᏣᏚᎵ ᏬᎦᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏣᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ?
021412.english: And the first day of unleavened bread, when they killed the passover, his disciples said unto him, Where wilt thou that we go and prepare that thou mayest eat the passover?
021412.phonetic: I-gv-yi-yi-no i-ga na-go-ta-nv-na ga-du a-gi-s-di-yi, na-hi-yu u-ni-lv ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi, gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, Ha-tlv tsa-du-li wo-ga-dv-nv-i-s-do-di-yi, ka-no-hi-ye-gi tsa-li-s-da-yv-di-yi?

021413.cherokee: ᏚᏅᏎᏃ ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏗᎦᏚᎲ ᎢᏍᏕᎾ, ᏙᏓᏣᏠᏏᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᏰᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏖᎵᏙ ᎠᎹ ᎠᏟᏍᏕᏍᏗ; ᎡᏍᏗᏍᏓᏩᏕᏒᎭ.
021413.english: And he sendeth forth two of his disciples, and saith unto them, Go ye into the city, and there shall meet you a man bearing a pitcher of water: follow him.
021413.phonetic: Du-nv-se-no a-ni-ta-li gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, a-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Di-ga-du-hv i-s-de-na, do-da-tsa-tlo-si-no a-s-ga-ya a-ye-he-s-di a-te-li-do a-ma a-tli-s-de-s-di; e-s-di-s-da-wa-de-sv-ha.

021414.cherokee: ᎢᎸᎯᏢᏃ ᏩᏴᎸᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᏁᏍᏗᏪᏎᎸᎭ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᏁᎳ, ᏗᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎭᏢ ᎠᏁᏙᎯ ᎤᏂᏴᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᎿᎭᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎣᎦᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ ᎬᎩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ.
021414.english: And wheresoever he shall go in, say ye to the goodman of the house, The Master saith, Where is the guestchamber, where I shall eat the passover with my disciples?
021414.phonetic: I-lv-hi-tlv-no wa-yv-lv-ha, hi-a ne-s-di-we-se-lv-ha a-s-ga-ya ga-ne-la, Di-de-yo-hv-s-gi hi-a ni-ga-we-ha, Ha-tlv a-ne-do-hi u-ni-yv-s-di-yi, na-hna ka-no-hi-ye-gi i-tsu-la-ha o-ga-li-s-da-yv-di-yi gv-gi-s-da-wa-di-do-hi.

021415.cherokee: ᏓᏍᏓᏎᎮᎵᏃ ᎤᏛᏅ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎧᏅᏑᎸᎢ, ᎦᏳᎳ ᎬᎿᎭᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ; ᎾᎿ ᎭᏍᎩᏯᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎭ.
021415.english: And he will shew you a large upper room furnished and prepared: there make ready for us.
021415.phonetic: Da-s-da-se-he-li-no u-dv-nv ga-lv-la-di ka-nv-su-lv-i, ga-yu-la gv-hna-i, a-le a-dv-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi; na-hna s-gi-ya-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-lv-ha.

021416.cherokee: ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯᏃ ᎤᏁᏅᏎ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏚᎲ ᏭᏂᎷᏤᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏭᏂᏩᏛᎮ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎸᎢ; ᎤᎾᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏁᏃ ᎧᏃᎯᏰᎩ ᏗᎵᏍᏓᏴᏗᏱ.
021416.english: And his disciples went forth, and came into the city, and found as he had said unto them: and they made ready the passover.
021416.phonetic: Gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi-no u-ne-nv-se a-le di-ga-du-hv wu-ni-lu-tse-i, a-le wu-ni-wa-dv-he na-s-gi-ya ni-du-we-se-lv-i; u-na-dv-nv-i-s-ta-ne-no ka-no-hi-ye-gi di-li-s-da-yv-di-yi.

021417.cherokee: ᎤᏒᏃ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎤᎷᏤ ᏓᏖᏁᎮ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ.
021417.english: And in the evening he cometh with the twelve.
021417.phonetic: U-sv-no nu-li-s-ta-nv u-lu-tse da-te-ne-he ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv.

021418.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏂᏅᏜᏓᎡᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎨᎢ, ᏥᏌ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏦᏍᏓᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎦ, ᏛᏆᏡᏔᏂ.
021418.english: And as they sat and did eat, Jesus said, Verily I say unto you, One of you which eateth with me shall betray me.
021418.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-ni-nv-dla-e-i a-le a-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ge-i, tsi-sa hi-a nu-we-se-i, U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, a-si-yv-wi hi-a tsi-ni-tsa-dv-nv i-tsu-la-ha tso-s-da-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-ga, dv-qua-tlu-ta-ni.

021419.cherokee: ᎤᎾᎴᏅᎮᏃ ᎤᏲ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏩᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏌᏉ ᎬᏪᏒᏛ, ᏥᎪ ᎠᏴ?  ᏅᏩᏓᎴᏃ, ᏥᎪ ᎠᏴ?  ᎠᏗᏍᎨᎢ.
021419.english: And they began to be sorrowful, and to say unto him one by one, Is it I? and another said, Is it I?
021419.phonetic: U-na-le-nv-he-no u-yo u-ni-ye-lv-ne-i, a-le hi-a ni-gv-wa-we-se-le-i, sa-quo gv-we-sv-dv, Tsi-go a-yv?  Nv-wa-da-le-no, Tsi-go a-yv?  A-di-s-ge-i.

021420.cherokee: ᎤᏁᏨᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏥᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎠᏖᎵᏙᎩᎯ ᏦᏍᏓᏑᏩᏍᎦ.
021420.english: And he answered and said unto them, It is one of the twelve, that dippeth with me in the dish.
021420.phonetic: U-ne-tsv-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, A-si-yv-wi ta-la-du i-tsi-dv ge-sv na-s-gi i-tsu-la-ha a-te-li-do-gi-hi tso-s-da-su-wa-s-ga.

021421.cherokee: ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎤᏪᏅᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎠᏥᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏲᎢᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏡᏗᏍᎩ!  ᎣᏏᏳ ᏱᎨᏎ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏄᏕᏅᎾᏉ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
021421.english: The Son of man indeed goeth, as it is written of him: but woe to that man by whom the Son of man is betrayed! good were it for that man if he had never been born.
021421.phonetic: Yv-wi U-we-tsi u-do-hi-yu-hi u-we-nv-s-di na-s-gi-ya ni-gv-nv go-we-lv a-tsi-no-he-s-gv-i; a-se-no u-yo-i-yu i-yu-li-s-da-ne-di na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya yv-wi U-we-tsi a-tlu-di-s-gi!  o-si-yu yi-ge-se i-yu-no na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya nu-de-nv-na-quo yi-ge-se-i.

021422.cherokee: ᎠᎾᎵᏍᏓᏴᎲᏍᎬᏃ ᏥᏌ ᎦᏚ ᎤᎩᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏨ, ᎤᎬᎭᎷᏰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏥᎩ, ᎢᏥᎦ; ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏰᎸᎢ.
021422.english: And as they did eat, Jesus took bread, and blessed, and brake it, and gave to them, and said, Take, eat: this is my body.
021422.phonetic: A-na-li-s-da-yv-hv-s-gv-no Tsi-sa ga-du u-gi-sv, a-le u-li-he-li-tsv, u-gv-ha-lu-ye-i, a-le du-ne-le-i, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-i, I-tsi-gi, i-tsi-ga; hi-a na-s-gi a-yv tsi-ye-lv-i.

021423.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ ᎤᎩᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏨ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏁᎴᎢ; ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏗᏔᎮᎢ.
021423.english: And he took the cup, and when he had given thanks, he gave it to them: and they all drank of it.
021423.phonetic: A-le u-li-s-qui-di u-gi-sv, a-le u-li-he-li-tsv, na-s-gi du-ne-le-i; ni-ga-dv-no na-s-gi u-na-di-ta-he-i.

021424.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎩᎩᎬ ᎢᏨ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏥᎨᎦᏤᏪᎸ.
021424.english: And he said unto them, This is my blood of the new testament, which is shed for many.
021424.phonetic: Hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le-i, hi-a na-s-gi a-yv a-gi-gi-gv i-tsv ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i, na-s-gi u-ni-tsa-ti tsi-ge-ga-tse-we-lv.

021425.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏴᎦᎦᏗᏔ ᏖᎸᎳᏗ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ, ᎬᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎢᏤ ᎦᏗᏔᎲᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ.
021425.english: Verily I say unto you, I will drink no more of the fruit of the vine, until that day that I drink it new in the kingdom of God.
021425.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-tsv-we-se-ha, v-tla hna-quo i-lv-hi-yu yv-ga-ga-di-ta te-lv-la-di u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi, gv-ni na-hi-yu i-ga i-tse ga-di-ta-hv-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-go-hi.

021426.english: And when they had sung an hymn, they went out into the mount of Olives.

021427.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏂᏥᎥ ᏂᎯ ᏙᏓᏦᏕᎵ ᎪᎯ ᏒᏃᏱ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏴ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᎪᏪᎳ, ᎠᏫ ᏗᎦᏘᏯ ᏓᏥᏴᏂᎵ, ᎤᏂᏃᏕᎾᏃ ᏛᎾᏗᎦᎴᏲᏥ.
021427.english: And Jesus saith unto them, All ye shall be offended because of me this night: for it is written, I will smite the shepherd, and the sheep shall be scattered.
021427.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, ni-tsi-v ni-hi do-da-tso-de-li go-hi sv-no-yi tsi-gi, a-yv ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di; hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv-i-go-we-la, A-wi di-ga-ti-ya da-tsi-yv-ni-li, u-ni-no-de-na-no dv-na-di-ga-le-yo-tsi.

021428.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᏆᎴᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎢᎬᏱ ᏓᏨᏰᏅᎡᎵ ᎨᎵᎵ ᎢᏴᏛ.
021428.english: But after that I am risen, I will go before you into Galilee.
021428.phonetic: A-se-no hna-quo di-qua-le-nv-hi ge-se-s-di, i-gv-yi da-tsv-ye-nv-e-li Ge-li-li i-yv-dv.

021429.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏱᏚᏃᏕᏍᏔᏅ, ᎠᏴ ᎠᏎ ᎥᏝ.
021429.english: But Peter said unto him, Although all shall be offended, yet will not I.
021429.phonetic: A-se-no Qui-da hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Na-s-quo ni-ga-dv yi-du-no-de-s-ta-nv, a-yv a-se v-tla.

021430.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎬᏪᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏉ ᏒᏃᏱ, ᎠᏏ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎾᏂᏴᎬᎾ ᏣᏔᎦ, ᏦᎢ ᏅᏓᏍᏆᏓᏱᎵ.
021430.english: And Jesus saith unto him, Verily I say unto thee, That this day, even in this night, before the cock crow twice, thou shalt deny me thrice.
021430.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya hi-a ni-gv-we-se-ha, Na-s-gi go-hi i-ga, a-le go-hi-quo sv-no-yi, a-si ta-li-ne na-ni-yv-gv-na tsa-ta-ga, tso-i nv-da-s-qua-da-yi-li.

021431.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏟ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎤᏁᏤ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏗᎩᏂᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏎ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎦᎬᏯᏓᏱᎦ.  ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏂᏪᏎ ᏂᎦᏛ.
021431.english: But he spake the more vehemently, If I should die with thee, I will not deny thee in any wise. Likewise also said they all.
021431.phonetic: A-se-no u-tli u-li-ni-gi-dv u-ne-tse hi-a nu-we-se-i, I-yu-no na-s-quo i-tsu-la-ha di-gi-ni-yo-hu-hi-s-di yi-gi, a-se v-tla yv-ga-gv-ya-da-yi-ga.  Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo nu-ni-we-se ni-ga-dv.

021432.cherokee: ᎨᏎᎻᏂᏃ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎢ; ᎯᎠᏃ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴ ᎬᏩᏍᏓᏩᏗᏙᎯ, ᎠᏂ ᎢᏥᏁᏍᏗ, ᏫᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ.
021432.english: And they came to a place which was named Gethsemane: and he saith to his disciples, Sit ye here, while I shall pray.
021432.phonetic: Ge-se-mi-ni-no du-do-v u-ni-lu-tse-i; hi-a-no ni-du-we-se-le gv-wa-s-da-wa-di-do-hi, A-ni i-tsi-ne-s-di, wi-ga-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv i-go-hi-dv.

021433.cherokee: ᏚᏖᏅᏎᏃ ᏈᏓ ᎠᎴ ᏥᎻ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎴᏅᎮ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏕᏯᏔᏁᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏓᏕᎢ;
021433.english: And he taketh with him Peter and James and John, and began to be sore amazed, and to be very heavy;
021433.phonetic: Du-te-nv-se-no Qui-da a-le Tsi-mi a-le Tsa-ni, a-le u-le-nv-he u-tsa-ti u-de-ya-ta-ne-le-i, a-le u-tsa-ti e-hi-s-di u-da-nv-da-de-i;

021434.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏕᏯᏔᏁᎭ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᎠᏂ ᎢᏥᏁᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
021434.english: And saith unto them, My soul is exceeding sorrowful unto death: tarry ye here, and watch.
021434.phonetic: A-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, A-qua-da-nv-do u-tsa-ti u-de-ya-ta-ne-ha a-yo-hu-hi-s-di na-s-gi-ya-i; a-ni i-tsi-ne-s-di, a-le i-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di.

021435.cherokee: ᎤᏍᏗᎩᏛᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎤᏪᏅ, ᎡᎳᏗ ᎤᏓᏅᏁᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏁ, ᎤᏔᏲᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎬᏩᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎶᎯᏎᏗᏱᏉ.
021435.english: And he went forward a little, and fell on the ground, and prayed that, if it were possible, the hour might pass from him.
021435.phonetic: U-s-di-gi-dv-no i-yv-dv i-u-we-nv, e-la-di u-da-nv-ne-i, a-le u-da-do-li-s-ta-ne, u-ta-yo-le-i, na-s-gi ye-li i-gv-wa-li-s-do-di yi-gi, na-hi-yu ge-sv u-lo-hi-se-di-yi-quo.

021436.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎠᏆ, ᎡᏙᏓ, ᏂᎯ, ᎨᏒ ᏰᎵᎦᏯᏉ ᎢᎨᏣᏛᏁᏗ ᏂᎦᎥᎢ; ᏍᎩᎲᏏᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏍᏈᏗ; ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏣᏚᎵᏍᎬᎢ.
021436.english: And he said, Abba, Father, all things are possible unto thee; take away this cup from me: nevertheless not what I will, but what thou wilt.
021436.phonetic: A-le hi-a nu-we-se-i, A-qua, E-do-da, ni-hi, ge-sv ye-li-ga-ya-quo i-ge-tsa-dv-ne-di ni-ga-v-i; s-gi-hv-si-quo hi-a na-s-gi u-li-s-qui-di; v-tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-yv a-qua-du-li-s-gv-i, ni-hi-s-gi-ni tsa-du-li-s-gv-i.

021437.cherokee: ᎢᎤᎷᏤᏃ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏩᏛᎮ ᎠᏂᎵᎾᎡᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴ ᏈᏓ, ᏌᏩᏂ, ᎯᎵᎭᏉᏧ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᏑᏟᎶᏛᏉ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎨᏣᏯᏫᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ?
021437.english: And he cometh, and findeth them sleeping, and saith unto Peter, Simon, sleepest thou? couldest not thou watch one hour?
021437.phonetic: I-u-lu-tse-no a-le du-wa-dv-he a-ni-li-na-e-i, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-le Qui-da, Sa-wa-ni, hi-li-ha-quo-tsu?  Tla-s-go su-tli-lo-dv-quo i-go-hi-dv na-s-quo ge-tsa-ya-wi-s-di yi-ge-se-i?

021438.cherokee: ᎢᏥᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᎴᎾᏍᏗᏱ ᏫᏥᎾᏄᎪᏨᎩ; ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎤᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗ, ᎤᏇᏓᎸᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏩᎾᎦᎳᎯᏳ.
021438.english: Watch ye and pray, lest ye enter into temptation. The spirit truly is ready, but the flesh is weak.
021438.phonetic: I-tsi-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di a-le i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi tle-s-di u-da-le-na-s-di-yi wi-tsi-na-nu-go-tsv-gi; A-da-nv-do u-do-hi-yu-hi u-dv-nv-i-s-di, u-que-da-lv-s-gi-ni a-wa-na-ga-la-hi-yu.

021439.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏭᎶᏒ, ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏔᏁᎢ, ᏄᏪᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏫᏄᏪᏎᎢ.
021439.english: And again he went away, and prayed, and spake the same words.
021439.phonetic: Ta-li-ne-no i-yv-dv wu-lo-sv, u-da-do-li-s-ta-ne-i, nu-we-sv na-s-gi-ya wi-nu-we-se-i.

021440.cherokee: ᏗᎤᎷᏨᏃ ᏚᏩᏛᎮ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎠᏂᎵᎾᎡᎢ, ᏗᏂᎦᏙᎵᏰᏃ ᏗᎦᎨᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏱᏂᎦᏔᎮ ᎢᏳᏂᏪᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏁᏤᏗᏱ.
021440.english: And when he returned, he found them asleep again, (for their eyes were heavy,) neither wist they what to answer him.
021440.phonetic: Di-u-lu-tsv-no du-wa-dv-he ta-li-ne a-ni-li-na-e-i, di-ni-ga-do-li-ye-no di-ga-ge-di-yu ge-se-i, v-tla a-le yi-ni-ga-ta-he i-yu-ni-we-s-di-yi u-ni-ne-tse-di-yi.

021441.cherokee: ᏦᎢᏁᏃ ᏫᏚᎷᏤᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᎨᏥᎵᏁᏍᏗᏉ ᎿᎭᏉ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏓ; ᎿᎭᏉ ᎦᎶᏐᎾ-ᎿᎭᏉ ᎠᏍᏆᎸ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎾ ᏕᎨᏥᏲᎯᏏ.
021441.english: And he cometh the third time, and saith unto them, Sleep on now, and take your rest: it is enough, the hour is come; behold, the Son of man is betrayed into the hands of sinners.
021441.phonetic: Tso-i-ne-no wi-du-lu-tse-le-i, a-le hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, ge-tsi-li-ne-s-di-quo hna-quo, a-le i-tsa-tsa-we-so-lv-s-da; Hna-quo ga-lo-so-na---hna-quo a-s-qua-lv na-hi-yu ge-sv-i; gv-ni-yu-quo yv-wi U-we-tsi a-ni-s-ga-na de-ge-tsi-yo-hi-si.

021442.cherokee: ᏗᏣᎴᎲᎦ, ᎢᏕᎾ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ ᎠᏆᏡᏗᏍᎩ ᎡᏍᎦᏂᏳ ᏓᏯᎢ.
021442.english: Rise up, let us go; lo, he that betrayeth me is at hand.
021442.phonetic: Di-tsa-le-hv-ga, i-de-na; gv-ni-yu-quo a-qua-tlu-di-s-gi e-s-ga-ni-yu da-ya-i.

021443.cherokee: ᎩᎳᏉᏃ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎦᏪᏂᏍᎨᎢ, ᏧᎾᎸᎪᏤ, ᏧᏓᏏ, ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏔᎳᏚ ᎢᏯᏂᏛ ᎨᏒ, ᏓᏘᏁᎮ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ, ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓ ᏗᏂᏁᎯ, ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏂᏅᏏᏛ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ.
021443.english: And immediately, while he yet spake, cometh Judas, one of the twelve, and with him a great multitude with swords and staves, from the chief priests and the scribes and the elders.
021443.phonetic: Gi-la-quo-no i-yv-dv a-si-quo ga-we-ni-s-ge-i, tsu-na-lv-go-tse, Tsu-da-si, a-si-yv-wi ta-la-du i-ya-ni-dv ge-sv, da-ti-ne-he u-ni-tsa-ti, a-ye-la-s-di--di-ga-nv-hi-dv a-le a-da di-ni-ne-hi, nv-da-gv-wa-ni-nv-si-dv nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi, a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi, a-le di-ni-la-wi-gi.

021444.cherokee: ᎤᏡᏗᏍᎩᏃ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏧᏩᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏎ ᎤᎾᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗ, ᎯᎠ ᎢᏳᏪᏒᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᏥᏯᏚᏣᎳᏅᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏒᏥᏂᏴᎲᎭ, ᎡᏣᏘᎾᏫᏛᎲᎭ ᎬᏩᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏁᏨᏁᏍᏗ.
021444.english: And he that betrayed him had given them a token, saying, Whomsoever I shall kiss, that same is he; take him, and lead him away safely.
021444.phonetic: U-tlu-di-s-gi-no gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsu-wa-ne-lv-hi ge-se u-na-do-le-ho-hi-s-do-di, hi-a i-yu-we-sv-hi ge-se-i, Gi-lo tsi-ya-du-tsa-la-nv-ha, na-s-gi ge-se-s-di, sv-tsi-ni-yv-hv-ha, e-tsa-ti-na-wi-dv-hv-ha gv-wa-du-da-le-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ne-tsv-ne-s-di.

021445.cherokee: ᎤᎷᏨᏉᏃ ᎩᎳᏉ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏭᎷᏤᎴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᏗᏍᏇᏲᎲᏍᎩ, ᏗᏍᏇᏲᎲᏍᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᏣᎳᏁᎢ.
021445.english: And as soon as he was come, he goeth straightway to him, and saith, Master, master; and kissed him.
021445.phonetic: U-lu-tsv-quo-no gi-la-quo i-yv-dv wu-lu-tse-le-i, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-i, Di-s-que-yo-hv-s-gi, Di-s-que-yo-hv-s-gi; a-le u-du-tsa-la-ne-i.

021446.english: And they laid their hands on him, and took him.

021447.cherokee: ᎠᏏᏴᏫᏃ ᎾᎥ ᎠᏂᏙᎿᎭᎢ, ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎤᎸᎮᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎤᎷᏰ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᏍᏔᏁᎢ.
021447.english: And one of them that stood by drew a sword, and smote a servant of the high priest, and cut off his ear.
021447.phonetic: A-si-yv-wi-no na-v a-ni-do-hna-i, a-ye-la-s-di--ga-nv-hi-dv u-lv-he-i, a-le nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi u-nv-si-da-s-di u-lu-ye a-le u-li-s-de-s-ta-ne-i.

021448.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎤᏁᏨ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏚᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏥᎪ ᎦᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᏨᏤᏥᏂᏴᎯᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏥᎷᎩ, ᏗᏥᏁᎯ ᎠᏰᎳᏍᏗ-ᏗᎦᏅᎯᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏂᏴᎰᎦ?
021448.english: And Jesus answered and said unto them, Are ye come out, as against a thief, with swords and with staves to take me?
021448.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no u-ne-tsv hi-a ni-du-we-se-le-i, Tsi-go ga-no-s-gi-s-gi tsv-tse-tsi-ni-yv-hi-so na-s-gi-ya i-tsi-lu-gi, di-tsi-ne-hi a-ye-la-s-di--di-ga-nv-hi-dv a-le a-da a-yv s-gi-ni-yv-ho-ga?

021449.cherokee: ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲᎩ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᏕᎦᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏍᎩᏂᏴᎮᎢ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ.
021449.english: I was daily with you in the temple teaching, and ye took me not: but the scriptures must be fulfilled.
021449.phonetic: Ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv-gi u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, de-ga-de-yo-hv-s-gv-gi, a-le v-tla yi-s-gi-ni-yv-he-i; u-do-hi-yu-di-s-gi-ni-no-nv ni-gv-nv Go-we-lv-i.

021450.english: And they all forsook him, and fled.

021451.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏫᏅ ᎤᏍᏓᏩᏛᏎᎢ, ᏙᎴᏛ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎤᏓᏇᏅᏕ ᎤᏰᎸᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏂᏫᏅᏃ ᎬᏩᏂᏴᎮᎢ.
021451.english: And there followed him a certain young man, having a linen cloth cast about his naked body; and the young men laid hold on him:
021451.phonetic: Gi-lo-no i-yu-s-di a-wi-nv u-s-da-wa-dv-se-i, do-le-dv a-nu-wo u-da-que-nv-de u-ye-lv-ha ge-sv-i; a-ni-wi-nv-no gv-wa-ni-yv-he-i.

021452.cherokee: ᏙᎴᏛᏃ ᎠᏄᏬ ᎤᏂᏰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏰᎸᎭ ᏚᎵᏘᎡᎴᎢ.
021452.english: And he left the linen cloth, and fled from them naked.
021452.phonetic: Do-le-dv-no a-nu-wo u-ni-ye-i, a-le u-ye-lv-ha du-li-ti-e-le-i.

021453.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏧᏬᎸ ᏭᎾᏘᏅᏍᏔᏁᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏕᎬᏩᎳᏫᎡ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸᎠᏁᎶᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏂᎳᏫᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏃᏪᎵᏍᎩ.
021453.english: And they led Jesus away to the high priest: and with him were assembled all the chief priests and the elders and the scribes.
021453.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi tsu-wo-lv wu-na-ti-nv-s-ta-ne-i; na-s-gi-no de-gv-wa-la-wi-e ni-ga-dv nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv-a-ne-lo-hi, a-le di-ni-la-wi-gi, a-le di-no-we-li-s-gi.

021454.cherokee: ᏈᏓᏃ Ꭸ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏍᏓᏩᏗᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏗᎦᏁᎸ ᏭᏴᎴᎢ, ᎤᏬᎴᏃ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᏛ ᎤᎦᎾᏬᏍᎨᎢ.
021454.english: And Peter followed him afar off, even into the palace of the high priest: and he sat with the servants, and warmed himself at the fire.
021454.phonetic: Qui-da-no ge i-yv-dv u-s-da-wa-di-se-i, na-s-gi nu-gv-wi-yu-sv a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi di-ga-ne-lv wu-yv-le-i, u-wo-le-no ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di a-ni-nv-i, a-le go-dv u-ga-na-wo-s-ge-i.

021455.cherokee: ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎠᏁᎶᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏓᏂᎳᏫᎥ ᎤᏂᏲᎮ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎸᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏡᏗᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎤᎾᏠᏤᏃ.
021455.english: And the chief priests and all the council sought for witness against Jesus to put him to death; and found none.
021455.phonetic: Nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--a-ne-lo-hi a-le ni-ga-dv da-ni-la-wi-v u-ni-yo-he u-ni-no-he-lv-hi Tsi-sa u-tlu-di-s-gi, na-s-gi u-ni-hi-s-di-yi, u-na-tlo-tse-no.

021456.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏣᏖᏰᏃ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎩ ᎬᏩᏡᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏠᏱ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
021456.english: For many bare false witness against him, but their witness agreed not together.
021456.phonetic: U-ni-tsa-te-ye-no ga-ye-go-gi a-ni-no-he-s-gi gv-wa-tlu-di-s-ge-i, a-se-no a-ni-no-he-s-gv v-tla u-tlo-yi yi-ge-se-i.

021457.cherokee: ᏚᎾᎴᏁᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎴ ᎬᏩᏡᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏂᏪᏍᎨᎢ;
021457.english: And there arose certain, and bare false witness against him, saying,
021457.phonetic: Du-na-le-ne-no gi-lo i-yu-na-s-di a-le ga-ye-go-gi u-ni-no-he-le gv-wa-tlu-di-s-gv-i, hi-a na-ni-we-s-ge-i;

021458.cherokee: ᎣᎦᏛᎦᏅᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᎧᏪᏍᎬᎩ, ᏓᏥᏲᏍᏔᏂ ᎯᎠ ᎤᏛᏅ-ᏗᎦᎳᏫᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎪᏱ ᏗᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎪᏢᏅᎯ, ᏦᎢᏉᏃ ᏧᏒᎯᏛ ᏛᏥᏱᎵᏙᎵ ᏛᎦᏁᏍᎨᎯ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏗᎪᏱ ᏗᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
021458.english: We heard him say, I will destroy this temple that is made with hands, and within three days I will build another made without hands.
021458.phonetic: O-ga-dv-ga-nv-gi hi-a ni-ka-we-s-gv-gi, Da-tsi-yo-s-ta-ni hi-a u-dv-nv--di-ga-la-wi-i-s-di-yi, na-s-gi di-go-yi di-gv-ta-nv-hi go-tlv-nv-hi, tso-i-quo-no tsu-sv-hi-dv dv-tsi-yi-li-do-li dv-ga-ne-s-ge-hi nv-wa-da-le di-go-yi di-gv-ta-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na.

021459.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏃᎮᎸᎯ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏠᏱ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ.
021459.english: But neither so did their witness agree together.
021459.phonetic: A-se-no na-s-quo na-s-gi u-ni-no-he-lv-hi v-tla u-tlo-yi yi-ge-se-i.

021460.cherokee: ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᎠᏰᎵ ᎤᎴᏅ, ᎤᏛᏛᏁ ᏥᏌ, ᎯᎠ ᏁᏪᏎᎢ, ᏝᏍᎪ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏯᏗᎭ?  ᎦᏙ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏣᏂᏃᎮᎭ ᎨᏣᏡᏗᏍᎬᎢ?
021460.english: And the high priest stood up in the midst, and asked Jesus, saying, Answerest thou nothing? what is it which these witness against thee?
021460.phonetic: Nu-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi a-ye-li u-le-nv, u-dv-dv-ne Tsi-sa, hi-a ne-we-se-i, Tla-s-go go-hu-s-di ya-di-ha?  Ga-do na-s-gi hi-a tsa-ni-no-he-ha ge-tsa-tlu-di-s-gv-i?

021461.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎡᎳᏪᏉ ᎤᏩᏎᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏳᏛᏁ ᏨᏁᏤᎢ.  ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎤᏛᏛᏁ, ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎴᎢ, ᏂᎯᏍᎪ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏗ ᎤᏪᏥ?
021461.english: But he held his peace, and answered nothing. Again the high priest asked him, and said unto him, Art thou the Christ, the Son of the Blessed?
021461.phonetic: A-se-no e-la-we-quo u-wa-se-i, a-le v-tla go-hu-s-di yu-dv-ne tsv-ne-tse-i.  Nu-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi ta-li-ne u-dv-dv-ne, a-le hi-a nu-we-se-le-i, Ni-hi-s-go Ga-lo-ne-dv, A-tsi-lv-quo-di U-we-tsi?

021462.cherokee: ᏥᏌᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏓᏰᏥᎪᎢ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎤᏬᎴᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏘᏏ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏣᎢᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎶᎩᎸ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ.
021462.english: And Jesus said, I am: and ye shall see the Son of man sitting on the right hand of power, and coming in the clouds of heaven.
021462.phonetic: Tsi-sa-no hi-a nu-we-se-i, A-yv na-s-gi; a-le da-ye-tsi-go-i yv-wi U-we-tsi u-wo-le-s-di a-ga-ti-si i-di-tlv u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv-i, a-le tsa-i-se-s-di u-lo-gi-lv ga-lv-lo-i.

021463.cherokee: ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒᏃ ᎠᏥᎸ-ᎨᎶᎯ ᏚᏄᏩᎥ ᏚᏪᏣᎦᎸᎮᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᏄᏪᏎᎢ, ᎦᏙᏃ ᎠᏏ ᏱᏗᎦᏚᎵ ᎠᏂᏃᎮᏍᎩ?
021463.english: Then the high priest rent his clothes, and saith, What need we any further witnesses?
021463.phonetic: Nu-gv-wi-yu-sv-no a-tsi-lv--ge-lo-hi du-nu-wa-v du-we-tsa-ga-lv-he-i, hi-a nu-we-se-i, Ga-do-no a-si yi-di-ga-du-li a-ni-no-he-s-gi?

021464.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏛᎬᎦ ᎠᏐᏢᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ; ᎦᏙ ᎢᏤᎵᎭ?  ᏂᎦᏛᏃ ᏕᎬᏭᎪᏓᏁᎴ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎬᏩᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
